body:
We haven't seen your response yet. Don't miss this chance to share your thoughts.
Team —

With less than 60 days to go before early voting begins, Karen is busy talking to voters around the city. She wants to hear from folks from every neighborhood in every zip code.

We're running an online survey from now until the end of the month so you can share your feedback directly with Karen. **[We looked through responses this morning, and we noticed that you haven't participated yet. Don't miss this chance to weigh in on L.A.'s future. Will you take two minutes to tell Karen what's on your mind? →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43416661/337098771/-1345628023?ms=em22_220321_svy_esrv_gq_act_kkr_tb_ettx&refcode=em22_220321_svy_esrv_gq_act_kkr_tb_ettx&source=em22_220321_svy_esrv_gq_act_kkr_tb_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220321_svy_esrv_gq_act_kkr_tb_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=RFxlqPfIT3Mipi4R0gmWYqCz7kg6N59ocxkCTIz%2Barsav6qg9RIijzwnmd%2B2YCYU22reKDVmM8BKFRWv4GPZFTeoQAOD5IjFN8IjJhvlkVFsdema2BZHZvHxvJ3e%2B3g5KCaLj6XtNAIhLCxxgC5Sew%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85NDYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDE4ZTU5Mi0yZWFkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kvqIKKfunexCAMQUaBXg7MhRPdCRt48zaMxqE4eal90=&emci=2c121d30-2ba9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=5418e592-2ead-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=2429742)**
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Karen Bass** <info@karenbass.com>
Date: Sat, Mar 5, 2022
Subject: I need your input
Team —

It's officially March, which means the primary is a little over three months away. I've been trekking all around our city meeting with health care workers, parents, students, and activists to hear directly from everyday Angelenos.

My top priority is making sure I am fighting for you and your interests, which is why I'm sending you a survey today. I wish I could sit down with every single Angeleno, but reaching out to you over email is the next best alternative.

**[Years of community organizing taught me that city government only works when all voices are included. Will you share your top priorities with me? Tell me what's on your mind by taking our short survey →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43416662/337098773/-1345628023?ms=em22_220321_svy_esrv_gq_act_kkr_tb_ettx&refcode=em22_220321_svy_esrv_gq_act_kkr_tb_ettx&source=em22_220321_svy_esrv_gq_act_kkr_tb_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220321_svy_esrv_gq_act_kkr_tb_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=RFxlqPfIT3Mipi4R0gmWYqCz7kg6N59ocxkCTIz%2Barsav6qg9RIijzwnmd%2B2YCYU22reKDVmM8BKFRWv4GPZFTeoQAOD5IjFN8IjJhvlkVFsdema2BZHZvHxvJ3e%2B3g5KCaLj6XtNAIhLCxxgC5Sew%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85NDYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDE4ZTU5Mi0yZWFkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kvqIKKfunexCAMQUaBXg7MhRPdCRt48zaMxqE4eal90=&emci=2c121d30-2ba9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=5418e592-2ead-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=2429742)**

It doesn't matter which neighborhood you live in, often it's the same issues that keep us up at night. It's clear, Angelenos are ready for a leader who will boldly, humanely address the homelessness crisis with a people-first, community-driven approach. Someone who will work to unite us across our differences.

I've never been afraid to make tough decisions. I'm ready to roll up my sleeves and do the work. And I want your voice to be a part of that process.

**[Will you take just two minutes to tell me what's on your mind? I will be meeting with my team next week to discuss our priorities moving forward, and it's crucial I hear from you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43416663/337098774/-1345628023?ms=em22_220321_svy_esrv_gq_act_kkr_tb_ettx&refcode=em22_220321_svy_esrv_gq_act_kkr_tb_ettx&source=em22_220321_svy_esrv_gq_act_kkr_tb_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220321_svy_esrv_gq_act_kkr_tb_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=RFxlqPfIT3Mipi4R0gmWYqCz7kg6N59ocxkCTIz%2Barsav6qg9RIijzwnmd%2B2YCYU22reKDVmM8BKFRWv4GPZFTeoQAOD5IjFN8IjJhvlkVFsdema2BZHZvHxvJ3e%2B3g5KCaLj6XtNAIhLCxxgC5Sew%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85NDYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDE4ZTU5Mi0yZWFkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kvqIKKfunexCAMQUaBXg7MhRPdCRt48zaMxqE4eal90=&emci=2c121d30-2ba9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=5418e592-2ead-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=2429742)**

In solidarity,

Karen

name: Your Reservation
subject: (1) Seat Saved for You
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
---
| | | Peter,

Are you really turning down the chance of a lifetime to have dinner with President Trump? We're SHOCKED!

We thought you were a top supporter of President Trump and House Conservatives, but our records show you _**DECLINED your chance to have dinner in Dallas with President Trump. **_

body:
This race in 2023 will be the most-watched in the country. We won in 2019 by just 5,136 votes, and Republicans think that means they have a real chance at winning back this governor's seat. Two Republican opponents have already announced their campaigns against Andy, and a wealthy, self-funded challenger may jump in the race soon.

All the progress we've made is going to be on the ballot next year – public school funding, infrastructure reform, voting rights, a strong economy. That's why it's crucial we re-elect Andy to keep moving Kentucky forward, but we can't do it without the support of this grassroots team.

name: Marisa Wood
subject: Just imagine Kevin McCarthy as Speaker of the House.
body:
While working families are struggling, he's hellbent on punishing Democrats who crossed him and paving the way for a Trump comeback. It’s sickening. | _We are alerting Democrats about Marisa Wood -- a public school teacher and Democrat running a historic campaign to unseat GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy. To support Marisa Wood's campaign,[chip in here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43417357/337101294/883924314?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjk1OTEzMC0yZmFkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=74JkTEE3jSEvqkaVnEOSybMAQ3DqTl4epKbDAX6-a_4=) We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/49196fbf-2cad-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a/0f959130-2fad-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjk1OTEzMC0yZmFkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=74JkTEE3jSEvqkaVnEOSybMAQ3DqTl4epKbDAX6-a_4=&id=124172018)._

Friend

I'm reaching out to ask you for a **[$3 donation](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43417361/337101298/-217444029?refcode=em-3.26.22-nopen-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjk1OTEzMC0yZmFkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=74JkTEE3jSEvqkaVnEOSybMAQ3DqTl4epKbDAX6-a_4=)** to my campaign to unseat GOP leader Kevin McCarthy. Next week marks our very first FEC fundraising deadline of 2022, and after the deadline hits our fundraising numbers will go public for all to see.

As the year goes on, McCarthy has only become more unhinged and desperate in his quest for the Speaker's gavel.

**He began the month by pointing the finger at Biden for not supplying Ukraine with weapons. That's despite supporting Trump's decision to withhold $391 million in aid to Ukraine unless they investigated Joe Biden. Then last week, he repeated his threats to boot Democrats like Adam Schiff from their committee roles if Republicans retake the House.**

Central Valley voters know that McCarthy is only out for himself. While working families are struggling, he's hellbent on punishing Democrats who crossed him and paving the way for a Trump comeback. It’s sickening.

I refuse to believe that McCarthy is untouchable. But if we’re going to stop him from getting the gavel, we need widespread grassroots support.

**[Before our FEC deadline hits, we need to raise $50,000 from across California and the country to put McCarthy on notice that we are going to give him the fight of his political career. name: Jazz Lewis
subject: For too many, quality education isn’t accessible
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jazz Lewis
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_march?amount=&refcode2=logo [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_march?amount=&refcode2=logo]
Folks, education is our nation’s greatest economic and anti-poverty tool. A good education has the power to challenge barriers of race and wealth, if and only if students are given the resources and appropriate support to thrive. But for too many Marylanders, quality education remains inaccessible, whether due to the zip code they live in, their language, inadequate school funding, or other factors outside of their control.
It's past time to enact reform at all levels of the educational experience. Let's be clear: we have the tools and ability to fix this; we only need to muster the political will to make it happen. I’ve worked hard in the Maryland House of Delegates to do just that, and I’m committed to working in Congress to get these initiatives across the finish line.
Please, let me know which reforms matter most to you. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/qSjkTpKtHEO1NcfHt5qDiQ2?contactdata=boH3ENxai%2FXNIN%2FspJK%2FIu22E3UYKI%2ByikBnnPLoZuADJFl7RK4FnAlsuLbJE0Fg8%2B0ZUnOyyO9GGOG18vE5bAt3XK7flvlT5DS7xrpZWNBgIRXdVFtxC9SnmjZJJ3wD%2FkdEFnHMKl%2BlDyZ7E7UfghbLVTiUDUZywHhg5Z%2Btmcw%3D&refcode2=body_link1] Here’s the first question:
It’s time to make college affordable and unburden millions of former students and empower them to start businesses, purchase homes, and more by canceling federal student loan debt. We must also expand access to trade and vocational schools to prepare our students for the well-paying, family-supporting jobs our communities desperately need. Is it important to you to support candidates who will fight for affordable higher education for all? 🔘 Yes, extremely important. 🔘 Yes, very important. 🔘 Yes, somewhat important. 🔘 No, not at all important. [link]
One of the greatest lessons of the pandemic is the profound impact our education system has on all of us.
- Parents struggling to monitor virtual learning while working from home
- Recent immigrants faced with navigating a new education system
- Folks lacking the education they need for career change
- Adults with disabilities in need of quality day programs
These are just some consequences we must contend with when our elected officials fail to provide the educational resources our families need.
Folks, change to our education system can’t wait. That’s why I’m committed to fighting for active, comprehensive measures to build the quality education system our families deserve.
Let me know your priorities by taking my quick survey now >>> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/qSjkTpKtHEO1NcfHt5qDiQ2?contactdata=boH3ENxai%2FXNIN%2FspJK%2FIu22E3UYKI%2ByikBnnPLoZuADJFl7RK4FnAlsuLbJE0Fg8%2B0ZUnOyyO9GGOG18vE5bAt3XK7flvlT5DS7xrpZWNBgIRXdVFtxC9SnmjZJJ3wD%2FkdEFnHMKl%2BlDyZ7E7UfghbLVTiUDUZywHhg5Z%2Btmcw%3D&refcode2=body_link2]
Together, we can meet this moment,
Jazz
Jazz Lewis [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88468/images/Jazz-Lewis-Portrait.png]
Jazz Lewis is an effective progressive leader running for the Democratic nomination in Maryland’s 4th Congressional District. A champion of issues ranging from criminal justice reform to health care access and economic equity, Jazz has represented the 24th Legislative District in Maryland’s House of Delegates since 2017. He also serves as Chair of the Maryland House Democratic Caucus.
Jazz would be the youngest African-American ever elected to represent Maryland in Congress. A lifelong Prince Georgian, Jazz lives in Glenarden with his wife and son.
CONTRIBUTE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_march?amount=&refcode2=biobox_btn]
Paid for by Friends of Jazz Lewis
Friends of Jazz Lewis
P.O. Box 7449
Largo, MD 20792
United States

| | | **ATTN: Your Republican Membership has EXPIRED**
For the last **2 years** , you have consistently stood by House Republicans' side. You've supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we've seen, **but we have bad news for you. **

**It pains me to have to tell you that for the first time ever, you 've failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There's good news though. I spoke with leadership about this special circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **[11:59 PM TONIGHT.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlqrkq0bidkujjcsc10bnj0c9qcohlges5n0ucf0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0spi6eor2c5h2bs "11:59 PM TONIGHT.")**

**[Are you going to renew your 2022 Membership and become a sustaining Republican Member for 2 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left and you are going to let your streak fade away?](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgb6s4jo44o01okeerk62oa7ivqsa38g7i9trj0g_rp22sh2s8i66ob0spi6eor2c5h2bs "Are you going to renew your 2022 Membership and become a sustain Republican Member for 2 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left and you are going to let your streak fade away?")**

We're approaching the biggest battle of our lives. The 2022 Midterm Elections will be the toughest election we've seen yet, and we need our strongest grassroots supporters on our side.

**The Democrats raised over $130 MILLION last year alone.** We're already behind, but with your help, we can close the gap, and take back the Conservative Majority in Congress.

You only have until **[11:59 PM](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ziiu928d5ug41lgoko75nmkegu9ns15n7jqpa200_rp22sh2s8i66ob0spi6eor2c5h2bs "11:59 PM")** to let us know if you plan to stand against the Left and their radical socialist agenda for a 3rd year in a row. **[Renew before it's too late >>>](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkjr6261jlnegqmo9ount255h36fpiohntp6pst0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0spi6eor2c5h2bs)**

Americans across the country are counting on you. Don't let them down.

Thank you,

Mark, National Republican Membership Office

Pelosi's raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zduig665ps484vmvomluhajfus44t523sbdnkeq8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0spi6eor2c5h2bs "Can we count on you to step up?")**

subject: This is a crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgette Gómez for Assembly 2022 Special Election, #1443884
body:
https://georgettegomez.org/ [https://georgettegomez.org/]
The cost of living in the San Diego region is making it unlivable . That's why my biggest priority in the California Assembly will be supporting our working families.
But first, I need to win my election in 10 days. Can you chip in before my final fundraising deadline of this race on Thursday? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/georgette_gomez_for_assembly_2022_special_election?refcode=X_032622_EOM_B]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/georgette_gomez_for_assembly_2022_special_election?refcode=X_032622_EOM_B [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/georgette_gomez_for_assembly_2022_special_election?refcode=X_032622_EOM_B]
According to the Voice of San Diego, rents have risen by 30% while available housing has dropped by 80%. Incomes haven't kept up with skyrocketing home prices, and hardworking folks are left to make tough decisions.
I grew up in Barrio Logan. I love the South Bay and the people in it. But there's a lot of work we have to do — expanding affordable housing, investing in public transportation, standing up for worker rights — to address the rising cost of living.
That's exactly what I plan to do in the Assembly.
With my election in two weeks, every dollar you give now will make a BIG difference. Please take a minute to contribute to my campaign for State Assembly. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/georgette_gomez_for_assembly_2022_special_election?refcode=X_032622_EOM_B]
Thank you!
-- Georgette
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/georgette_gomez_for_assembly_2022_special_election?refcode=X_032622_EOM_B [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/georgette_gomez_for_assembly_2022_special_election?refcode=X_032622_EOM_B]

disclaimer_text: paid for by Joe Jaworski
body:
Joe Jaworski has the integrity to know what’s right... and the courage to do it. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jaworskifortexas/2022-13617306?e=5d8d80652b)
---
| | [ ](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=2f0dcd4638&e=5d8d80652b)
---
| | , In 2008, after Hurricane Ike devastated Galveston Island, the University of Texas Board of Regents held a closed door meeting and made the decision to cut 3,800 jobs at the University of Texas Medical Branch (UTMB). **This would have been a debilitating blow for the future of Galveston.** Joe Jaworski was appalled at the UT Regent's decision — which was made behind closed doors in El Paso — and chose to fight back. He sued the UT Regents for violating the state's Open Meetings Act and asked that the decision to make the job cuts be voided. And you know what happened? **Joe won. His legal case saved thousands of jobs and kept UTMB open in Galveston.** Joe Jaworski has the integrity to know what’s right... and the courage to do it. [**Contribute today to help Joe win the May 24 runoff election.**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=37a94c8352&e=5d8d80652b) UTMB is a vital employer and healthcare provider for Galveston-area residents. It also serves one of the most diverse student bodies in the entire country. If the jobs had been cut, it would have had a detrimental effect on Galveston's future and success, especially in the aftermath of Hurricane Ike. Joe, a proud UT Law School alumni, wasn't afraid to go up against the University of Texas system. Because when Joe shows up to fight, he fights for what's right. He fights for the people. That's why we need your help to win the May 24th Runoff Election - because Joe Jaworski is our best shot at defeating corrupt Ken Paxton in November. [**This campaign is all about taking out the most corrupt Attorney General in Texas history. Are you ready to fire Ken Paxton and elect a man with the experience, ethics and integrity to serve as the people's attorney?**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=b2f1035341&e=5d8d80652b) We need leaders that choose right over wrong. We need an Attorney General who will use our legal system to fight for fairness and justice. **We need Joe Jaworski.** [**Please make a donation today to help us win in May so that we can beat Ken Paxton in November.**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=37aa56edf0&e=5d8d80652b)
— Team Jaworski

| | Team,

I know you get a lot of gimmicky emails from politicians promising that your donations will be matched 2X, 5X, 10X, and they sound too good to be true – and often, they are. In this case, our match is made up of real supporters – **and I’m excited to say that we’re closing in on fully utilizing the Malinowski Matchers fund before March 31st!**

The _**Malinowski Matchers**_ know that it’s more than our district at stake in this election, and that while our opponents rely on dark money, we are fueled by this grassroots team. We need all the help we can get if we’re going to re-elect Tom and hold onto the majority in Congress in November.

[That’s why it’s so important for our supporters to make a donation before our first FEC deadline of 2022! We need everyone pitching in if we’re going to raise the remainder of the matching funds before March 31st! name: Tim Ryan HQ
subject: Ohio is a must-win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=2996%2E3611125%2E5zHTt8 ][IMG]

Hello—

Democrats have a real shot at holding and expanding the Senate majority
this year. And winning in Ohio is critical to making that happen.

Polls say we can flip this seat blue, but it won’t be easy. The Republican
Party has set their sights on Tim Ryan and they’ll throw everything but
the kitchen sink at him. We can’t let them get away with buying this
election.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/9877?t=1008&amount=10&akid=2996%2E3611125%2E5zHTt8 ]If Democrats want to hold and expand the Senate this year, Ohio is a
must-win. So we’re asking you to make a donation of $10 or more toward our
$150,000 End-of-Quarter goal now to help us flip this Senate seat blue:

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/9877?t=1009&amount=10&akid=2996%2E3611125%2E5zHTt8 ]Donate

Growing up, Tim watched his neighbors lose their livelihoods as steel
mills shut down and jobs got shipped overseas. Now he’s running for Senate
to make sure families like his are taken care of and that all workers get
the dignity and respect they deserve.

Meanwhile, Mitch McConnell and Tim’s millionaire GOP opponents don’t give
a damn about working families.

The stakes have never been higher, folks. If we want to raise
the minimum wage, combat climate change, expand health care and more, we
need to win Ohio and expand the Senate majority.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/9877?t=1010&amount=10&akid=2996%2E3611125%2E5zHTt8 ]Will you donate $10 or more right now toward Tim’s End-of-Quarter goal
to help us flip this seat blue and put Democrats on the path to expanding
the Senate majority?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/9877?t=1011&amount=10&akid=2996%2E3611125%2E5zHTt8 ]Donate

Thanks!

Team Ryan

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/47?t=1002&akid=2996%2E3611125%2E5zHTt8 ][IMG]
We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in
touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,
[ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/Fewer_Emails/?t=1003&akid=2996%2E3611125%2E5zHTt8 ]click here.
If you'd like to make a donation to our campaign, you can do that below!
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/1774?t=1004&akid=2996%2E3611125%2E5zHTt8 ]Donate Monthly
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/49?t=1005&akid=2996%2E3611125%2E5zHTt8 ]Donate Once

Tim Ryan for Ohio
P.O. Box 189
Niles, Ohio 44446
United States
[ mailto:info@timforoh.com ][IMG] [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11?t=1006&akid=2996%2E3611125%2E5zHTt8 ][IMG]

You know me.
I'm not the kind of person to beat around the bush. President Trump and I have that in common.
**So I hope you 'll listen to me when I tell you that I'm devastated:**
The Democrats pulled in over a BILLION dollars online last year with one express purpose: to wipe out each and every ally of President Donald J. Trump. It's more cash than any of us could have imagined. This is bad. VERY bad.
_So I 'll cut to the chase:_
I know it's a lot to ask, but we need a [**surge of donations**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59953807:6bnFXpo9N:m:1:3299561967:A1316FE5D1563F111D7BE15DD8A4E0B8:r) ASAP if we're going to save President Trump's closest allies... tomorrow will be too late.
I'm hoping you'll rise to the occasion right now before the end of the day.
[**Help Save President Trump 's Top Allies >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59953807:6bnFXpo9N:m:1:3299561967:A1316FE5D1563F111D7BE15DD8A4E0B8:r)
Please think carefully about the consequences of what you do next.
**The way I see it, you only have two choices:**
You can either delete this email, wave the white flag, and let the Democrats overwhelm ALL of President Trump's most loyal allies in Congress with their massive fundraising advantage...
[**... OR YOU CAN STAND WITH US, FIGHT BACK, AND WIN!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59953807:6bnFXpo9N:m:1:3299561967:A1316FE5D1563F111D7BE15DD8A4E0B8:r)
I've made my decision. I'm standing with President Trump. _What about you?_
For freedom,

name: Team Cammack
subject: Failed policies can’t go on for another TWO years.
body:
The Liberal agenda is a hollow frame built on a foundation of failures
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NJpmnISyktrSFSrXRU2BwIlOWuIljrfOwEw_Nstw5f3Ot24V_1VmHwiO0uxMVEA9FjkbxYxlbyZJEodl6N81URqQvXgf-0mKBu2qx2f77xONx0ipTB1btBec0JYxno9tguMKsDC0wu2iD8S_-Q_kkYl4Be-kgos_P4DrwKkUKKlc3hfXpbO6RPX1g9oKezVj6gZBQo3zOgk7B95NQoE8B1Mz2lndIKxa&c=v-o1J4bVl7_fWnqmf0_pLjNykzql9n7UyCzm2Nsj1evwX2fbxoRnoQ==&ch=Bsr7FHjTPRxpo0KfI_SojhPpGpoA4y_4C5FiC4zqaMK0CWFM0ZH5IQ==)
---
| Friend,
The Liberal agenda is a hollow frame built on a foundation of failures. Not one single piece of legislation has benefitted America's working class. Instead, they continue their tradition of siphoning money from your wallet into their pockets.
Take for instance our rising gas prices. Biden cared more about creating profits for his Green New Deal, so he crippled our energy sector and forced us to buy foreign oil. Even worse, he pushed for trillion-dollar spending at the expense of the American taxpayer while they were already struggling to make ends meet.
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NJpmnISyktrSFSrXRU2BwIlOWuIljrfOwEw_Nstw5f3Ot24V_1VmHwiO0uxMVEA9FjkbxYxlbyZJEodl6N81URqQvXgf-0mKBu2qx2f77xONx0ipTB1btBec0JYxno9tguMKsDC0wu2iD8S_-Q_kkYl4Be-kgos_P4DrwKkUKKlc3hfXpbO6RPX1g9oKezVj6gZBQo3zOgk7B95NQoE8B1Mz2lndIKxa&c=v-o1J4bVl7_fWnqmf0_pLjNykzql9n7UyCzm2Nsj1evwX2fbxoRnoQ==&ch=Bsr7FHjTPRxpo0KfI_SojhPpGpoA4y_4C5FiC4zqaMK0CWFM0ZH5IQ==)
---
| When the Left isn't picking your pockets, they're hard at work dismantling America. Our southern border is left wide open for illegal immigrants, drug cartels, and violent criminals. Every American state is becoming less stable thanks to the radical "defund the police" movement, which has made our communities far less safe than only a few years ago.
No matter which way you look at it: America can't handle two more years of the Leftist agenda. Kat isn't here to appease the Socialists trying to destroy our great country, she's here to put America back on top. She's working overtime to bring the Red Wave needed to end these anti-American crises. [Can Kat count on your help in preventing two more years of the Leftist agenda?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NJpmnISyktrSFSrXRU2BwIlOWuIljrfOwEw_Nstw5f3Ot24V_1VmHwiO0uxMVEA9FjkbxYxlbyZJEodl6N81URqQvXgf-0mKBu2qx2f77xONx0ipTB1btBec0JYxno9tguMKsDC0wu2iD8S_-Q_kkYl4Be-kgos_P4DrwKkUKKlc3hfXpbO6RPX1g9oKezVj6gZBQo3zOgk7B95NQoE8B1Mz2lndIKxa&c=v-o1J4bVl7_fWnqmf0_pLjNykzql9n7UyCzm2Nsj1evwX2fbxoRnoQ==&ch=Bsr7FHjTPRxpo0KfI_SojhPpGpoA4y_4C5FiC4zqaMK0CWFM0ZH5IQ==)

clean_body: The Liberal agenda is a hollow frame built on a foundation of failures | | | | | | == | Friend, The Liberal agenda is a hollow frame built on a foundation of failures. Not one single piece of legislation has benefitted America's working class. Instead, they continue their tradition of siphoning money from your wallet into their pockets. Take for instance our rising gas prices. Biden cared more about creating profits for his Green New Deal, so he crippled our energy sector and forced us to buy foreign oil. Even worse, he pushed for trillion-dollar spending at the expense of the American taxpayer while they were already struggling to make ends meet. | == | When the Left isn't picking your pockets, they're hard at work dismantling America. Our southern border is left wide open for illegal immigrants, drug cartels, and violent criminals. Every American state is becoming less stable thanks to the radical "defund the police" movement, which has made our communities far less safe than only a few years ago. No matter which way you look at it: America can't handle two more years of the Leftist agenda. Kat isn't here to appease the Socialists trying to destroy our great country, she's here to put America back on top. She's working overtime to bring the Red Wave needed to end these anti-American crises. == | | | == | | | == | Thank you for your support, Team Cammack | | == | == == == | | Kat for Congress | 5200 NW 43rd Street, Suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 | | Sent by mailto:info@katforcongress.com

Dr. Fauci’s long-time colleagues have even said this is the most visibly hurt they’ve seen him – he needs our support now more than ever! | As a Congressman and as a doctor myself, I’ve seen the devastating impacts of COVID-19 on our country. I can confidently say that Dr. Fauci’s leadership has been essential in leading us through this pandemic. But anti-science Republicans like Rand Paul will do ANYTHING to destroy his reputation and spread misinformation. So it’s up to us to protect Dr. Fauci’s legacy and continue our fight against COVID-19. Thank you for your support, Dr. Raul Ruiz Cincinnati.com: Rand Paul calls Anthony Fauci a 'menace;' latest in increasingly personal feud | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. name: Jessica Cisneros
subject: Henry Cuellar’s anti-choice record in Congress»
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JESSICA CISNEROS FOR CONGRESS** ](https://u1584542
body:
If you’re ready to send more pro-choice Democrats to Congress, will you contribute now to support my campaign? | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wDJSxiYwIObpoERRcxDTs8R7Pd64c4gzFd01MYfYP5LR-ub1Ks_Aqk9-Fd-ejyFQk56A38KwPLIJv7BQE-9SA1mnYXq2pkEVdtuPVFE39zlnVTa05W9DkmdVdjGGz3D4mdp6b1ETstYx1qhmDH6_2THt-VZZEHpm0i7TwnUBs8VeDckpoTuGVcOLij3zq-iN0XjhFSmyM7Mq3DEoMEAfkjrttRtxV-k8bmJl9bRVF7LrFB9AUNv2dbWnKl6ei-KJ1s4jZY54EUV2RG2UaUwkfrO_poqd9I9OsAJvpUQBrGpkVaFkwXJKN6UWIz2xyekjE/3ko/XRToq2MRRU2dZekhzMiaiw/h0/vQWbxHkvOMc4bg9Y7gfA5CNKQ7SPCYoyj-0FuOkH598) Peter,

Our reproductive freedoms are under constant attack. Last year in Texas, the legislature passed Senate Bill 8, a law that bans abortion around six weeks into a pregnancy — setting a dangerous precedent for the state of abortion rights across the country. And now, many states are using the framework behind S.B.8 to pass their own dangerous abortion bans.

Now more than ever, Congress must make codifying _Roe v. Wade_ a priority to secure abortion rights under federal law. The attacks won’t stop from far-right conservatives and we can’t stop fighting to defend reproductive rights.

But our representative, Henry Cuellar, has a history of aligning himself with the anti-choice lobby. In fact, **he is the LAST anti-choice Democrat in the House**. He even gave a speech and received an award at the nation’s largest anti-choice rally earlier this year. **We can’t trust him to fight for _all_ South Texans and do what’s right for us.**

[_**Cuellar’s anti-choice platform is dangerous and South Texans deserve better than this betrayal of their constitutional rights. Once elected to Congress, I will fight harder than ever to codify _Roe v. Wade_ and secure access to abortion care for all. If you’re with me, will you make a contribution to my campaign so I can get to work to protect and defend reproductive rights in Congress? **_](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQC9AWTUMOUbPVw7TVEv0hpsJpz-yJG66BHoRig3a3lTvTCn2YI50qaJs1FZ8PkjCLeOvNQPwpViUF9mZ5VFJgNsxfQVlTDIiTwDnlJfN96w8xdj35AuINeoTd_RFW8THbrKqMz84v1VD-nrdGPFut7gOqd2t4HBrljsZzc_c2KabKpQ-xWFpY5NrksHDkEckiXaPV7fNs5YOX76i7lU3Tvp5L715kIVgzgsxoKZBybGwcm8Gm7Cevxxt7s98uCNoK9h7Nvc6fj_vAQu_fSBAe2jKEFivq3qYJL3EXzwCbidNM54IlOCTT_3zSialW9UXSR/3ko/XRToq2MRRU2dZekhzMiaiw/h1/4JE-SHOvGP2Ka3OysaIJmWDhL6HkCESI1m8CDbJfFTc) [Contribute »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQC9AWTUMOUbPVw7TVEv0hpsJpz-yJG66BHoRig3a3lTvQGTYSOh-x3e5kxGvJ3BfgdwSIeUzDUSb7jHbH-6IODgA-yoA4CG3wpKvD_yjhAaAW9XOKvgL6QlMetaXpmLfl7_kI2u-M_qClkbWvSDSYga6L5txDwZAsSc6cXp6PT5n4T6Qa_fzsZC7L55v_C72__yQIzWd0Ejxjs2_3m-vahOA5xM4q4-Mxv_S66AF_yFmPkC45zu04G-AfxPJHSFB-cpNODsWdFXlNIgTeeuMdyg_81ohhavWjVnSidtjf1MwdN7CpmR9qIPeu6fCmns-mf/3ko/XRToq2MRRU2dZekhzMiaiw/h2/S8qitTf1lXJg0JcimX1z4OzXJO8m_ZpxxpnRDKUFL0U) It’s not a secret where Henry Cuellar stands on the right to choose.

After Texas’ Republican leaders passed S.B.8 — our Congressman refused to defend us and our reproductive rights. In fact, he doubled down by voting “no” to pass the Women’s Health and Protection Act (WHPA), a bill that would codify _Roe v. Wade_ into federal law.

But once I am elected to Congress, I will work overtime to ensure abortion rights are fully protected. Because I understand that quality healthcare — including access to reproductive healthcare — is necessary to achieve justice and economic security for low-income Black and Latino people, who face more roadblocks in order to access contraception.

In the last election, anti-choice special interests like the Koch brothers’ empire flooded into our race to defeat us. **But now that we’re just 59 days from the runoff election and we’re ramping up our efforts to garner enough support we need to defeat Cuellar.**

[_**Now is the time to step up if we want to protect abortion rights. clean_body: If you’re ready to send more pro-choice Democrats to Congress, will you contribute now to support my campaign? | | | Peter, Our reproductive freedoms are under constant attack. Last year in Texas, the legislature passed Senate Bill 8, a law that bans abortion around six weeks into a pregnancy — setting a dangerous precedent for the state of abortion rights across the country. And now, many states are using the framework behind S.B.8 to pass their own dangerous abortion bans. Now more than ever, Congress must make codifying Roe v. Wade a priority to secure abortion rights under federal law. The attacks won’t stop from far-right conservatives and we can’t stop fighting to defend reproductive rights. But our representative, Henry Cuellar, has a history of aligning himself with the anti-choice lobby. In fact, he is the LAST anti-choice Democrat in the House. He even gave a speech and received an award at the nation’s largest anti-choice rally earlier this year. We can’t trust him to fight for all South Texans and do what’s right for us. It’s not a secret where Henry Cuellar stands on the right to choose. After Texas’ Republican leaders passed S.B.8 — our Congressman refused to defend us and our reproductive rights. In fact, he doubled down by voting “no” to pass the Women’s Health and Protection Act (WHPA), a bill that would codify Roe v. Wade into federal law. But once I am elected to Congress, I will work overtime to ensure abortion rights are fully protected. Because I understand that quality healthcare — including access to reproductive healthcare — is necessary to achieve justice and economic security for low-income Black and Latino people, who face more roadblocks in order to access contraception. In the last election, anti-choice special interests like the Koch brothers’ empire flooded into our race to defeat us. But now that we’re just 59 days from the runoff election and we’re ramping up our efforts to garner enough support we need to defeat Cuellar. Juntos, Jessica Cisneros | To give by check: PO Box 660 Laredo, TX 78042

name: Giffords.org
subject: We need you to join President Biden and call on Congress to pass background checks, ban assault weapons and high capacity magazines, and repeal immunity for gun manufacturers.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
On this issue, there is NO division among the American people watching at home.
#

[**PLEASE ADD YOUR NAME AS A CITIZEN CO-SPONSOR OF JOE BIDEN’S CALL TO PASS BACKGROUND CHECKS, BAN ASSAULT WEAPONS AND REPEAL IMMUNITY FOR GUN MANUFACTURERS.**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/biden_sotu_petition/?source=em220326-1-30&refcode2=1739.3935704.kyvViO&t=1&akid=1739%2E3935704%2EkyvViO)
[](https://go.giffords.org/signup/biden_sotu_petition/?source=em220326-1-30&refcode2=1739.3935704.kyvViO&t=2&akid=1739%2E3935704%2EkyvViO)
Friends - during President Biden’s State of the Union address a few weeks ago, President Biden made an impassioned plea to Congress that it’s long past time to take meaningful action that will make our communities safer from gun violence.
It was, at times, a divided night in the chamber. Oftentimes members of one party stood while members of the other remained seated.
But on this issue, there is far less division among the American people watching at home than the political pundits would have you believe.
The vast majority of Americans want action—action that will save lives.
Today, especially today, we want to send a message to Congress:
[**Please sign Giffords’ petition in support of President Biden’s call to pass background checks, ban assault weapons and high capacity magazines, and repeal immunity for gun manufacturers.**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/biden_sotu_petition/?source=em220326-1-30&refcode2=1739.3935704.kyvViO&t=3&akid=1739%2E3935704%2EkyvViO)
The President didn’t have to speak as long as he did on this issue. We know stopping gun violence is a personal priority for him. Now let’s make sure Congress knows it's a priority of yours as well.
\- The team at Giffords
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/biden_sotu_petition/?source=em220326-1-30&refcode2=1739.3935704.kyvViO&t=4&akid=1739%2E3935704%2EkyvViO)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=1739%2E3935704%2EkyvViO) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

subject: Why today?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
Being a working person and running for Senate isn't easy.
#

Why today?
We send a number of fundraising emails — all of them important to Malcolm's success in this race. But why is today's different? Why is today the day it's so important for you to make your first donation to this campaign?
Please let us explain:
Being a working person and running for Senate isn't easy. Malcolm is in this race because he knows in his bones what it's like when government doesn't work for working people.
It's true our Democratic opponents have a big cash advantage, but what they don't have is the kind of lived experience that Pennsylvania families need in their next U.S. Senator.
Malcolm can win this race — he's got more endorsements than any other candidate and he's the only candidate in this field who can bring the same coalition that elected President Biden back together this year.
But we have to hit our fundraising goals to stay competitive, and we've got a huge deadline ahead of us next week.
So we are sincerely asking:
[Can you please make your first contribution to Malcolm Kenyatta's campaign before our final quarterly FEC deadline next week? Help us show the incredible strength of this team when our fundraising numbers go public.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43410185/337065749/-358086307?refcode2=8f5b0eb7-13ad-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&refcode=em220326-1-30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjViMGViNy0xM2FkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JR9BUNl0ncVDLZTrgD5QLbZxj22ThOPv0TZpgi1ksk8=)

subject: Quick update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Strahan for Congress
body:
We need every Team Strahan supporter on board.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/13f6f2cd6cba/quick-update?e=daf3f68050)
https://secure.winred.com/strahan-for-congress/e_status_update_eoq_0322?utm_source=E-HouseFile&utm_campaign=StrahanJ_eoq-2_20220322&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=eoq-2&utm_agency=PG
Hey Peter,

I’ll keep this quick – I’m sure you’re busy this weekend.

Jennifer asked me to reach out personally, because our records show you have not pitched in yet to our all-important End-of-Quarter grassroots fundraising drive. And right now, we still need to raise $8,671 online to reach our goal.

To win this primary race, we need EVERY supporter on board at this critical time!

Please make a (https://secure.winred.com/strahan-for-congress/e_status_update_eoq_0322?utm_source=E-HouseFile&utm_campaign=StrahanJ_eoq-2_20220322&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=eoq-2&utm_agency=PG) $5, (https://secure.winred.com/strahan-for-congress/e_status_update_eoq_0322?utm_source=E-HouseFile&utm_campaign=StrahanJ_eoq-2_20220322&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=eoq-2&utm_agency=PG&amount=5) $10, (https://secure.winred.com/strahan-for-congress/e_status_update_eoq_0322?utm_source=E-HouseFile&utm_campaign=StrahanJ_eoq-2_20220322&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=eoq-2&utm_agency=PG&amount=10) $20.22, (https://secure.winred.com/strahan-for-congress/e_status_update_eoq_0322?utm_source=E-HouseFile&utm_campaign=StrahanJ_eoq-2_20220322&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=eoq-2&utm_agency=PG&amount=20.22) or $50 (https://secure.winred.com/strahan-for-congress/e_status_update_eoq_0322?utm_source=E-HouseFile&utm_campaign=StrahanJ_eoq-2_20220322&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=eoq-2&utm_agency=PG&amount=50) donation
today to stand with Jennifer >>> (https://secure.winred.com/strahan-for-congress/e_status_update_eoq_0322?utm_source=E-HouseFile&utm_campaign=StrahanJ_eoq-2_20220322&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=eoq-2&utm_agency=PG)

With so many important races on the ballot this year, we know it’s difficult to pitch in to every campaign you’re supporting.

But your financial help in this fight truly could not be more important.

We need to STAND UNITED as conservatives to send national embarrassment MTG packing and restore our voice in Congress this November!

Thank you for any contribution you can make this weekend. (https://secure.winred.com/strahan-for-congress/e_status_update_eoq_0322?utm_source=E-HouseFile&utm_campaign=StrahanJ_eoq-2_20220322&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=eoq-2&utm_agency=PG)

Friends,

**I want to make sure you are paying attention to this.

[I am humbly asking for your financial support for my campaign.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=0be9946161f846d992d76262e3346b26&_e=DWDjYGvQpqDghaigymnC-XmV3JVONh-LWnpBoEVNgLtwm8N4O3JjUgayAlnEv3zEPXf6NPPxYVFx8fQfFhx5wAaF08Q_61BAHGYWx1aaoOrNT8XwfbEqoXeD2eoCGKawX6JD9AVpTpITg1ckbwX0oN9nL8Xcf1ckW0TuNTEVS_5YIbcud0q-c_bAPRPtR-Pq_mvbpuSor8yyJx4TJiQu1jBWWEHVsG0fflNlkea2sMdYRso2l65TJ3sQWyAfJkTe_j6Stkx9Lmp9ZN-2hEpmTHRP9khg4GDEy-5YYB7A8hmTuiQh9fj9-LuQ4uJf9xAvm8YTp9GNU3kD4TGs1bdgEco8mlhEVQTM5eh85kKIr4Nj1td5gI03x-VGhZNYhQfhiSvsUQdgNycn4BitttUbNsuoNobVjb-w52uIJ1z9z7QZAgDRx4LUYlUtNsPWejE4e-FbQ4z4-ihYkwdt12YsTwX2OzW4adu5Goq_QC205i1rKPvCQy0frAy6Y6s9Pv2LpKx-6zbKxKi6GjowD44w7l8LhLH1imwRN9Fj4mU_wds%3D)** We need serious leaders, and I am fully committed to being an advocate for real representation. They are serious. **And we have to elect serious people.**

Right now in our party, we have people who are openly antisemitic. We have people who are openly racist. And we have people who have openly attended white supremacist conferences.

In politics, we always want to have a big tent. But no tent can ever be big enough for those views. And we all have to be very clear about that.

**[Can you chip in $5, $10, $20, or more to elect SERIOUS conservatives to Washington?>>](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=0be9946161f846d992d76262e3346b26&_e=DWDjYGvQpqDghaigymnC-XmV3JVONh-LWnpBoEVNgLtwm8N4O3JjUgayAlnEv3zEPXf6NPPxYVFx8fQfFhx5wAaF08Q_61BAHGYWx1aaoOrNT8XwfbEqoXeD2eoCGKawX6JD9AVpTpITg1ckbwX0oN9nL8Xcf1ckW0TuNTEVS_5YIbcud0q-c_bAPRPtR-Pq_mvbpuSor8yyJx4TJiQu1jBWWEHVsG0fflNlkea2sMdYRso2l65TJ3sQWyAfJkTe_j6Stkx9Lmp9ZN-2hEpmTHRP9khg4GDEy-5YYB7A8hkF29SZ4EpdYq96s7fdXvQx3R0CbWGIbitJ0e4WgFXgAw5jov0snkXDCjgvDs42vD9P1U1F1JPTzXvIWUvWvnW43Pn5hEzDUgpeslKCkQlusu1dssLFJvN4l6ppFKj8EIK-q-uD-plnmoVKHbl36jAYzuhAEWXG0QhaKc8GbSIAy7XC3rUBKh_-rOjrx97-4G99armFAnxt8IG2tAxAcQLy_35_KuPG52jDINrhUU_N1rqALvrNb923M6HMwOVeRfvsq9MAHDX3cptOhJmOHXiy)**

name: Laura - Team Herschel
subject: A down payment on the future
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59953538:J0fmxpozN:m:1:3317145305:27242D43D81B718065BB9332CE3EA58E:r)

---
Peter,

Team Herschel has real goals we need to meet to keep our campaign functioning at 100%.
* **2,455:** That's the number of additional donors we need before March 31st. Why? Because it's crucial we identify more donors in the first quarter of this election year than we did in the last quarter of 2021. [**If 2,455 conservatives make a donation before March 31 st,**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59953538:J0fmxpozN:m:1:3317145305:27242D43D81B718065BB9332CE3EA58E:r) we'll be in good shape headed into the 2nd quarter.
* **$23 million:** That's the amount of cash our Democrat opponent has in the bank to run attack ads against me. In fact, he's already spent more than $3 million airing TV ads in the last month. We hope to match his fundraising success, [**but we'll need your help to do that.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59953538:J0fmxpozN:m:1:3317145305:27242D43D81B718065BB9332CE3EA58E:r)
* **March 31 st:** Our 1st quarter fundraising deadline. We need every ounce of support we can muster before midnight on March 31st. After this date, we'll have to make public what our campaign raised from January - March. [**It's critical to get your buy-in before the end of the month and post big numbers.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59953538:J0fmxpozN:m:1:3317145305:27242D43D81B718065BB9332CE3EA58E:r)
* **161,030:** That's the number of donations we've received since launching our campaign last summer. It's incredible - especially since Herschel has never run for office before. We know there is more support out there, and [**we're asking for you to join our team today. If you've given previously, would you consider giving another donation - even a small one of $5 or $10?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59953538:J0fmxpozN:m:1:3317145305:27242D43D81B718065BB9332CE3EA58E:r)

[**Please don't wait until March 31st to stand with us. We need your help right away.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59953538:J0fmxpozN:m:1:3317145305:27242D43D81B718065BB9332CE3EA58E:r)

[** MAKE YOUR GIFT NOW -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59953538:J0fmxpozN:m:1:3317145305:27242D43D81B718065BB9332CE3EA58E:r)
Thanks,

Laura Dunaway
Finance Director
Team Herschel

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59953539:J0fmxpozN:m:1:3317145305:27242D43D81B718065BB9332CE3EA58E:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59953540:J0fmxpozN:m:1:3317145305:27242D43D81B718065BB9332CE3EA58E:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59953541:J0fmxpozN:m:1:3317145305:27242D43D81B718065BB9332CE3EA58E:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59953542:J0fmxpozN:m:1:3317145305:27242D43D81B718065BB9332CE3EA58E:r)

name: Team Booker
subject: Before March ends
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter — we’re
running one of the most-watched Senate campaigns in the nation right now.

Folks across the country are waiting to see what happens when Kentuckians
head to the polls in May and November of this year. In just a few days
we’ll face one of the most important fundraising deadlines of our campaign
thus far, and everyone will be watching. [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220326?refcode=em20220326-1687&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&refcode2=1687_346206_CQiXVe&akid=1687%2E346206%2ECQiXVe ]We set a goal to raise
$200,000 by the end of the month — and as a grassroots campaign that
relies on individual donors, we can’t get there without your support:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220326?refcode=em20220326-1687&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&refcode2=1687_346206_CQiXVe&akid=1687%2E346206%2ECQiXVe ][IMG]

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220326?refcode=em20220326-1687&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&refcode2=1687_346206_CQiXVe&akid=1687%2E346206%2ECQiXVe ]DONATE $5 NOW →

This campaign is about transforming the future of Kentucky, because for
too long, Rand Paul has consistently ignored Kentuckians and our needs. He
never cared when our hospitals were at max capacity from COVID cases, how
long someone’s been out of a job, or whether they can afford rent next
week. Rand is a politician who will say or do anything to get in the news,
put the spotlight on himself and his conspiracy theories, and sell us out
to big industries.

This campaign is about putting the spotlight on real people. People often
overlook Kentuckians because they think Kentucky is a deep-red state. In
2020, built a ground-breaking movement and proved them wrong. This time,
we’re ready to fight for Kentucky even harder, and we’re excited to build
even more support for our movement.

We’re ready to take back our future, from the hood to the holler.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220326?refcode=em20220326-1687&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&refcode2=1687_346206_CQiXVe&akid=1687%2E346206%2ECQiXVe ]Everything we raise by end-of-quarter will be public, and Rand Paul,
the GOP, and the media will be paying close attention to what Charles and
our team is doing. Please chip in $5 or whatever you’re
able towards our $200,000 goal right now.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220326?refcode=em20220326-1687&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&refcode2=1687_346206_CQiXVe&akid=1687%2E346206%2ECQiXVe ]DONATE $5 NOW →

Thank you,

Team Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220326-1687-footer&t=1024&refcode2=1687_346206_CQiXVe&akid=1687%2E346206%2ECQiXVe

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1687%2E346206%2ECQiXVe

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Folks across the country are waiting to see what happens when Kentuckians head to the polls in May and November of this year. In just a few days we’ll face one of the most important fundraising deadlines of our campaign thus far, and everyone will be watching. [ ]We set a goal to raise $200,000 by the end of the month — and as a grassroots campaign that relies on individual donors, we can’t get there without your support: [ ][IMG] [ ]DONATE $5 NOW → This campaign is about transforming the future of Kentucky, because for too long, Rand Paul has consistently ignored Kentuckians and our needs. He never cared when our hospitals were at max capacity from COVID cases, how long someone’s been out of a job, or whether they can afford rent next week. Rand is a politician who will say or do anything to get in the news, put the spotlight on himself and his conspiracy theories, and sell us out to big industries. This campaign is about putting the spotlight on real people. People often overlook Kentuckians because they think Kentucky is a deep-red state. In 2020, built a ground-breaking movement and proved them wrong. This time, we’re ready to fight for Kentucky even harder, and we’re excited to build even more support for our movement. We’re ready to take back our future, from the hood to the holler. [ ]Everything we raise by end-of-quarter will be public, and Rand Paul, the GOP, and the media will be paying close attention to what Charles and our team is doing. Please chip in $5 or whatever you’re able towards our $200,000 goal right now. [ ]DONATE $5 NOW → Thank you, Team Booker Contribute to Charles Booker:

name: Morgan Harper
subject: I’ve made it clear
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
I’ve made it clear that I’ll debate anyone, at any time
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220326-851-footer-ak&t=2&akid=851%2E90090%2EKaj7Pz)
There are less than 48 hours until I finally debate Tim Ryan.
I’ve made it clear that I’ll debate anyone, at any time, so that Ohioans can hear my ideas for a better kind of representation in the U.S. Senate. And I’m ready to hold my Democratic opponents accountable to their records on stage on Monday — **I’ve been looking forward to it.**
**[It would be a huge boost to my debate prep to know that you’ve got my back as I’m on that stage. So that’s why I’m asking: Can you chip in $15 today?](https://act.morganharper.org/go/30040?t=3&akid=851%2E90090%2EKaj7Pz)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/30046?refcode=em20220326-851&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=851%2E90090%2EKaj7Pz)**
**We’re in crunch time now.** Currently our primary is still scheduled for May 3rd and assuming that remains the date, this debate with Tim Ryan will be one of voters’ only chances to hear from the candidates directly, on stage together.
As you probably know, Tim Ryan has a huge war chest from corporate PACs and establishment backing - he’ll be getting his message to voters. We have to get our message to voters too. That’s why your donation is so critical.
**With a movement behind us we can fight for real progressive representation for Ohio.[Can you make a contribution today to help us get our message to voters before the May 3rd primary? ](https://act.morganharper.org/go/30040?t=23&akid=851%2E90090%2EKaj7Pz)**
Thank you for having my back, as always. I’m glad to have you on our team. **And don’t forget to tune into the debate live on Monday at 11:30am ET.**
Together,
Morgan
[](https://act.morganharper.org/go/30040?t=24&akid=851%2E90090%2EKaj7Pz)
Morgan Harper for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20220326-851-footer&t=25&refcode2=851_90090_Kaj7Pz&akid=851%2E90090%2EKaj7Pz)**
---

Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43418565/337107589/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2750-fr-nd-v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTJiZGVhYS0zN2FkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LYSd3cBT8BWoTOop3xQKNRuSRO8jKbPfgr0u2GcShtc=)

name: Alex Padilla for California
subject: "I would tell them to persevere"
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
We wanted to make sure you saw Alex’s note:
#

**Friends — we wanted to make sure you saw Alex’s note the other day about Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson’s nomination to the Supreme Court and the powerful response she gave to his question.**
* * *

Hi there,
As a member of the Senate Judiciary Committee, I had the honor of participating in the confirmation hearings for Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson’s nomination to the Supreme Court.
I also had the chance to meet with her privately, and I’ve studied her record closely.
**It is my belief that Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson will make a fantastic Supreme Court Justice, and I’m proud to support her nomination.**
Judge Jackson is eminently qualified and will make history as the first Black woman on the Supreme Court, and as the first public defender on the Supreme Court.
And over the past few days during the confirmation hearings, I watched Judge Jackson calmly handle outrageous attacks and lines of questioning from some of my Republican colleagues.
I also watched her confidently and ably address questions about the law and the role of the court. Her poise and expertise were inspiring to many people watching, including myself.
So for my last question, I asked Judge Jackson if she had any words for the young people watching. And I want to share her response in full, because it really moved me. [**Here's what she said:**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/424?t=1&akid=700%2E159979%2EUbjfWa)
_I hope to inspire people to try to follow this path because I love this country, because I love the law, because I think it’s important that we all invest in our future._
_And the young people are our future. So I want them to know that they can do or be anything, and I will tell them what an anonymous person said to me once._
_I was walking through Harvard Yard my freshman year. As I mentioned, I went to public school and I didn’t know anything about Harvard until my debate coach took me there to enter a speech competition, and I thought this is a great university. It was basically one of the only ones I’d seen, and I said maybe I’ll apply when I’m a senior._
_But I get there and woah, it’s so different. I’m from Miami, Florida, and Boston is very cold. It was rough. It was different from anything I’d known. There were lots of students there who were prep school kids, like my husband, who knew all about Harvard. And that was not me._
_And the first semester, I was really homesick, I was really questioning. Do I belong here? Can I make it in this environment? And I was walking through the yard in the evening, and a Black woman I did not know was passing me on the sidewalk. And she looked at me, and I guess she knew how I was feeling. And she leaned over as we crossed and said ‘persevere.’_
_I would tell them to persevere._
Like I said, I believe Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson will make an incredible addition to the Supreme Court — both because of her obvious qualifications, but also because of the power she has to inspire the next generation of Americans.
It’s my honor to support her nomination to the Supreme Court.
Thank you,
Alex Padilla

* * *

Alex Padilla is the first Latino ever elected to the U.S. Senate from California. Now, he’s fighting every day to reform our broken immigration system, protect our planet from climate change, and guarantee health care as a human right for ALL Americans. So with our first FEC deadline of 2022 just a week away, we have to ask:
[**Can you please make a contribution — of any amount you can afford — to keep Alex Padilla in the Senate? Our campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you, so every donation means a lot.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-mar22?refcode=em220326-1-15&t=2&refcode2=700_159979_UbjfWa&akid=700%2E159979%2EUbjfWa)
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-mar22?refcode=em220326-1-15&t=3&refcode2=700_159979_UbjfWa&akid=700%2E159979%2EUbjfWa)**

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=700%2E159979%2EUbjfWa)

I was walking through Harvard Yard my freshman year. As I mentioned, I went to public school and I didn’t know anything about Harvard until my debate coach took me there to enter a speech competition, and I thought this is a great university. It was basically one of the only ones I’d seen, and I said maybe I’ll apply when I’m a senior. But I get there and woah, it’s so different. I’m from Miami, Florida, and Boston is very cold. It was rough. It was different from anything I’d known. There were lots of students there who were prep school kids, like my husband, who knew all about Harvard. And that was not me. And the first semester, I was really homesick, I was really questioning. Do I belong here? Can I make it in this environment? And I was walking through the yard in the evening, and a Black woman I did not know was passing me on the sidewalk. And she looked at me, and I guess she knew how I was feeling. And she leaned over as we crossed and said ‘persevere.’ I would tell them to persevere. Like I said, I believe Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson will make an incredible addition to the Supreme Court — both because of her obvious qualifications, but also because of the power she has to inspire the next generation of Americans. It’s my honor to support her nomination to the Supreme Court. Thank you, Alex Padilla Alex Padilla is the first Latino ever elected to the U.S. Senate from California. Now, he’s fighting every day to reform our broken immigration system, protect our planet from climate change, and guarantee health care as a human right for ALL Americans. So with our first FEC deadline of 2022 just a week away, we have to ask: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate

body:
| | | Did you catch my team’s message earlier this week, Peter Willis? I wanted to make sure you saw it, because the urgency is REAL. We’ve got to hit this $20,000 goal before March 31 — the success of our campaign for affordable healthcare, for climate action, for universal childcare, and for ending lobbyist-funded corruption depends on it. **More than half of NY-03 voters are still undecided, and we’ve got to raise the resources to reach those people before the June primary.** Take a look at what my team said about why this deadline is so important, and chip in if you can. Thanks in advance for all your help! | [Donate](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuvrE3uYoMlSSKiL8kN3Dr3yfA7ihb9Mw70GAIEyAyNrAmD5e2X3j_hFXNCxkksqccJQ5PGhhLawYBlQatqm59F2IUS62JXYY4eMHI_7Bc8bW5zyL7isoixI7m61PVlndbJY8ES07ojvE7C20z-v372s1gd_Wvj2VLaca_eFcR6ouoZYi0YCSZAvGSLClxN-ipjd7xHRLhMgO-k1O36I7Cid_3X1RuHkwGsnqwas9V_K3u9BchM4CuDvxjLPjXx0AzOG-mzahxLNWMb0kES2LgvJUbzP_8eRG1PsrfYIMMXn5YPE88-coxzY_sE68ydaoZVDiv9OCSg5jZtreRzAPmVRcloHwDHdG1uhXrZKXsXATO11aM-LBkwMcuoMPyRHoHR6AwRiMHGebaPuI820pk/3ko/MT0N71Q2TjGIWwlZipFIpQ/h0/SUpOFh3mwxKeU03EvEVKZdSArbKu_asMcRjdxvnVGqg)

Hey, Peter Willis.
Get this: According to our internal polling, _more than half of primary voters in the district are undecided_. **This race is wide open, and we have to capitalize.**
But we’re a little nervous. We set an ambitious goal of $20,000 in grassroots donations before the huge end-of-quarter March 31 deadline, but with just ten days to go, we’re not where we need to be. **[Can you chip in whatever you’re able to help us close the gap? Even $10 or $20 goes a long way!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuvrE3uYoMlSSKiL8kN3Dr3yfA7ihb9Mw70GAIEyAyNrAmD5e2X3j_hFXNCxkksqccJQ5PGhhLawYBlQatqm59ia4Mcb3CRV8Z7GqrVZ_5h0pSzWBmtkZ4lXP4BAzQGta9fdN1fEPCUFFbKklNumnsGhxhCaX9gdQ4fZKQbWbGsd9S1OZ8idNcccbQu1pPFaWYA6cGguwP1EZSN1wVA13xz1vROnO_dDm0bl-giY0b4PrsjWXgXf9XbMtiGZkpVS5qJoF92QkRJD8H_Zvk7aiSJyeGIQYzJHHAU26LswoCrfUFjC_v3VrSCRmbOj5mhYoFC1SGJEXMBQ2cEuamlqFLkJ5A3nBVSt08W5kj1tVTyq_xZNWO8UVw5g6ueKIyH0M0uJ6Hdm7xSWNazmqvRqRd/3ko/MT0N71Q2TjGIWwlZipFIpQ/h2/U2Hf5UYVDNQ-JVtdN5MMVtYq3BBc2LUAZlJw6nuxGC8)**

It’s so critical that we hit this goal, because the money we raise now will determine how many voters we can reach before the primaries, making sure they understand that they have a chance to end the status quo and elect a true progressive champion in November.
**The fact that over half of voters are undecided means the need to fund our field programs just got A LOT more urgent.**
When voters actually hear what Melanie is fighting for — lower healthcare costs, meaningful climate action, safer neighborhoods, and better-paying jobs for NY-03’s working-class families — they’re on board (even people who haven’t voted for Democrats in years!).
But the challenge right now is we have to reach them. Basic travel expenses and costs for campaign supplies are really starting to add up. With gas prices through the roof right now, we have to find other ways to make up the gaps in our budget.
**So, we’re asking you**. We know it’s a tough time for many people right now, but [**anything you can spare today will go a long way towards providing working people with the policies, support, and opportunities that they need to thrive.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuvrE3uYoMlSSKiL8kN3Dr3yfA7ihb9Mw70GAIEyAyNrAmD5e2X3j_hFXNCxkksqccJQ5PGhhLawYBlQatqm59awykuqIUpsnHryFPfy2B10HSY3-Voncbdv4LvyHcoQchVxU7oM-PHM4fqO-s8Dw6KwE-OZr4f-rQRhgbFPR5NVNuvRRDXqlFReBUYPTzW6BcbZT4gbfQoGzV5MPTDMKWLBXPTkD2TUpNVhK-gaDkEX9Ndu1nbBE6Lh3_kAT0_ZrLBrQz15kFBY3ahD-bwCWR4ZSRfgmPv7aPU2q4m_HPUk0m5rlzkp7npms8DlfKrg8LeHzyfxWsojhXzn1bNZlq91RxNvM2we3Kpgj5_tl4N8ilZP7AwvlVvMcRhUGFB7LYP8H1AY7pEgXSnVYytr6e/3ko/MT0N71Q2TjGIWwlZipFIpQ/h7/kcnMOKLk895YTUoBTZDFF9_mQzssB7wTPh3hNMHNg4A)

clean_body: | | | Did you catch my team’s message earlier this week, Peter Willis? I wanted to make sure you saw it, because the urgency is REAL. We’ve got to hit this $20,000 goal before March 31 — the success of our campaign for affordable healthcare, for climate action, for universal childcare, and for ending lobbyist-funded corruption depends on it. More than half of NY-03 voters are still undecided, and we’ve got to raise the resources to reach those people before the June primary. Take a look at what my team said about why this deadline is so important, and chip in if you can. Thanks in advance for all your help! | Melanie ——— forwarded message ——— From: Team Melanie Date: March 21, 2022 Subject: More than half of voters are undecided Hey, Peter Willis. Get this: According to our internal polling, more than half of primary voters in the district are undecided. This race is wide open, and we have to capitalize. But we’re a little nervous. We set an ambitious goal of $20,000 in grassroots donations before the huge end-of-quarter March 31 deadline, but with just ten days to go, we’re not where we need to be. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | It’s so critical that we hit this goal, because the money we raise now will determine how many voters we can reach before the primaries, making sure they understand that they have a chance to end the status quo and elect a true progressive champion in November. The fact that over half of voters are undecided means the need to fund our field programs just got A LOT more urgent. When voters actually hear what Melanie is fighting for — lower healthcare costs, meaningful climate action, safer neighborhoods, and better-paying jobs for NY-03’s working-class families — they’re on board (even people who haven’t voted for Democrats in years!). But the challenge right now is we have to reach them. Basic travel expenses and costs for campaign supplies are really starting to add up. With gas prices through the roof right now, we have to find other ways to make up the gaps in our budget. So, we’re asking you. We know it’s a tough time for many people right now, but ** Thanks so much, Team Melanie Melanie D'Arrigo is a mother of three and healthcare advocate running for New York's 3rd District on Medicare for All and the Green New Deal. Our movement isn't taking a dime of corporate PAC money, which means we need your support. ** | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MELANIE DARRIGO (not by corporations or lobbyists) Friends of Melanie D'Arrigo P.O. Box 312 Port Washington, NY 11050 | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Melanie D'Arrigo for NY-03, please .

| Team, every year, national women’s group Emily’s List hands out an award named after our own – Congresswoman Gabby Giffords.

We have the opportunity to make sure this award goes to an Arizona leader. **With your help, we can make that happen!**

**[Phoenix Mayor Kate Gallego is one of five nominees for this year’s Rising Star Award. Will you take five minutes and vote for Mayor Gallego to bring home this award named after Congresswoman Giffords?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDIENIH7UXfqbI_GJMnlSNUbWJNT-ZoOh5PPzCs26NnJnSo0i4U2ui3LkdGVcpj_YpG8hs5J99wJiEDOQSd2FKKVC2ZKCp-tTJo64uDxIGRHhizICS45TIe8PljQqASiQT-7B-Cvpptvbv8AYfFOzpuVxDcMpXWWmNmqEeIcZtrrTeWjxM3cpjA4cnt9zmJbe8ouLpBjTY-eik5j9y6YzSMpKCpPlUFggVPrVA-vEJL8xJ51ldePo-dE-d_yZaBYt1JxBWt5y3c-Tq0rZDVS1yRkv7Pc_gm7vQuEYRNnZ041lrTMLvnSe4C8cKJIBpSIV2upWewyhzUr5DHaz119pwYC564lAJV9WyCvG6tBvs2CW8-8SvPI92akx1aUkKtrbYglKL8vQXNBH_Mksu1jhw_Y/3ko/oQWEDbI5RNeUV5q3ZwQ1bg/h1/7OU2TpVZaWDEU_bh-FeL1WTxMp3kcbdAzb3XCRyysWM)** [
VOTE FOR MAYOR GALLEGO](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDIENIH7UXfqbI_GJMnlSNUbWJNT-ZoOh5PPzCs26NnJnSo0i4U2ui3LkdGVcpj_YpG8hs5J99wJiEDOQSd2FKKVC2ZKCp-tTJo64uDxIGRHhizICS45TIe8PljQqASiQT-7B-Cvpptvbv8AYfFOzpuW0fFjz9XicaPyXvQOGVNDprku1JKxEpMccul8bSVmf8xbeSMWQskgO1n6zwVIK51Z2_OcNE-EF416SBr6wW7Y74V91qs9YaQrDSZuLQ9QJ3D8_TSUNbFkoBotcw1Wsx0zkjw8copOBuSyDWY356VzU_Xw_LGn_u6FU6RwddAEugoT7OE7CSCwcJdd111ukOFB6fnKlUHtPJNkT_TFesNaM688NwhZkMmLZv0fa61yTLMwLonzFeJ7K9owZz2iqNoI/3ko/oQWEDbI5RNeUV5q3ZwQ1bg/h2/kQe8OIDwaxsjJ92wF0GTPh54UtrrBOAlmMygcqPCQpw)
According to Emily’s List, The Gabrielle Giffords Rising Star Award celebrates an extraordinary woman serving in state or local office. The award honors a woman who demonstrates the sort of commitment to community, dedication to women and families, and determination and civility that have been the highlights of former Rep. Gabrielle Giffords’ career, in and out of office.

In our (biased) opinion, Mayor Gallego fits this description perfectly! Mayor Gallego was elected with the highest ever number of votes cast for Phoenix mayoral candidates and has successfully balanced running the nation's 5th largest city during a pandemic while being a mom of a young son.

Additionally, Mayor Gallego has known Congresswoman Giffords for a long time. Here’s a photo of them at the 2008 DNC convention in Denver.

clean_body: | | | We can’t let an Arizonan lose an award named after Gabby Giffords! | | | Team, every year, national women’s group Emily’s List hands out an award named after our own – Congresswoman Gabby Giffords. We have the opportunity to make sure this award goes to an Arizona leader. With your help, we can make that happen! According to Emily’s List, The Gabrielle Giffords Rising Star Award celebrates an extraordinary woman serving in state or local office. The award honors a woman who demonstrates the sort of commitment to community, dedication to women and families, and determination and civility that have been the highlights of former Rep. Gabrielle Giffords’ career, in and out of office. In our (biased) opinion, Mayor Gallego fits this description perfectly! Mayor Gallego was elected with the highest ever number of votes cast for Phoenix mayoral candidates and has successfully balanced running the nation's 5th largest city during a pandemic while being a mom of a young son. Additionally, Mayor Gallego has known Congresswoman Giffords for a long time. Here’s a photo of them at the 2008 DNC convention in Denver. | ?linkid=4&canid=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-missing-your-name-for-2022-2&emailreferrer=email1489299subject1948119&emailsubject=need-your-help-to-win-an-award Sincerely, AZ Dems For up-to-date COVID-19 information and guidance, visit Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Rick McGuire Treasurer. Arizona Democratic Party 2910 North Central Ave Phoenix AZ 85012 United States | | Sent via . name: VanHollen.org
subject: 4,135,780 is a big number
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VAN HOLLEN FOR SENATE
body:
Defending the Senate majority is not something we can do alone
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43412406/337077183/396464211?refcode=em-logo&source=em220326-1-a&refcode2=64218c11-1bad-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&contactdata=CW+6XMh0NGWwcYg3mwUi0H7+WMdanyeSXksJRvaXEqzDEzIutrMXU2A0VMlNVJrE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDIxOGMxMS0xYmFkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iaSdkbdytCFvV2Q8yzvIdF-_U_FKWUaqJ9txQ55slxk=)
**4,135,780.**
That’s the number of registered voters in Maryland, according to last month's Maryland Board of Elections voter registration activity report.
**$3.**
That's the contribution we're asking you to make ahead of our first quarter FEC deadline next week — to help make sure we have the resources to reach every single registered voter before the start of early voting on October 27.
If we want any chance of making progress over the next two years of the Biden administration, we have to make sure Mitch McConnell does not gain any ground and that he does not succeed in flipping a single Senate seat.
But we cannot do this alone. We need the support and engagement of this grassroots team to help us build and sustain a campaign that touches every corner of this state from Western Maryland to the Eastern Shore and everyone in between.
So with just a few days to go until our official deadline, we are asking:
**[Can you please make your first $3 donation to Chris Van Hollen's campaign before our FEC deadline next Thursday? We wouldn't ask if it weren't so important.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43412407/337077184/-149995803?source=em220326-1-a&refcode2=64218c11-1bad-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&contactdata=CW+6XMh0NGWwcYg3mwUi0H7+WMdanyeSXksJRvaXEqzDEzIutrMXU2A0VMlNVJrE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDIxOGMxMS0xYmFkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iaSdkbdytCFvV2Q8yzvIdF-_U_FKWUaqJ9txQ55slxk=)**
**[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43412408/337077185/-149995803?source=em220326-1-a&refcode2=64218c11-1bad-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&contactdata=CW+6XMh0NGWwcYg3mwUi0H7+WMdanyeSXksJRvaXEqzDEzIutrMXU2A0VMlNVJrE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDIxOGMxMS0xYmFkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iaSdkbdytCFvV2Q8yzvIdF-_U_FKWUaqJ9txQ55slxk=)**
Your donation sends a powerful message that you want Chris to keep standing up for working families and continue to take on the gun lobby, Big Pharma, dark money, Big Oil and every other special interest group that is trying to prevent us from making progress.
This election is an inflection moment for our country. We can’t afford to go backwards. Thank you for helping us prepare for the tough fights ahead.
\- Team Van Hollen

PAID FOR BY VAN HOLLEN FOR SENATE

name: Team Erica Smith
subject: Three reasons to donate to Erica’s campaign
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ERICA FOR US
body:
#
We’re sure you’re getting a lot of emails asking you to chip in to campaigns ahead of the FEC fundraising deadline on the 31st. So, we’d like to give you three reasons why your contribution to support Erica Smith can make a massive impact:
1. **Control of the U.S. House is going to come down to NC-01.** Because of redistricting, Republicans have a chance to flip this once-safe seat this year — putting our House majority in jeopardy and our progress on voting rights, healthcare, climate action, reproductive rights, and more at risk.
2. **Erica is gaining massive momentum, and our movement is growing fast.** Democratic allies, organizations, and leaders across the country are throwing their full support behind our campaign — from Congresswoman Katie Porter to Democracy for America and Planned Parenthood to Sunrise Movement.
3. **Our primary election is nearly 7 weeks away, and this FEC deadline is our last chance to show everyone the strength of our campaign.** Nearly 90% of congressional races are won by the candidate who has the most money — so our top opponents, super PACs, pundits, and voters will be watching our numbers to see if Erica has what it takes to defend this seat.

So, that’s why we’re asking. At this critical moment for our campaign, we need a surge in small-dollar grassroots donations to emails like this one to reach our upcoming $40,000 end-of-quarter goal.
******[_Can we count on you to make a $5 donation to Erica Smith for Congress right now? Whether you’re from North Carolina or not, every donation will help us build the grassroots support it’ll take to win and protect the U.S. House._](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/46818?t=2&akid=1033%2E3698%2ErwssLW) **
**[Donate $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/46824?refcode=em20220326-1033&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=1033%2E3698%2ErwssLW)**

— Team Erica Smith

clean_body: We’re sure you’re getting a lot of emails asking you to chip in to campaigns ahead of the FEC fundraising deadline on the 31st. So, we’d like to give you three reasons why your contribution to support Erica Smith can make a massive impact: 1. Control of the U.S. House is going to come down to NC-01. Because of redistricting, Republicans have a chance to flip this once-safe seat this year — putting our House majority in jeopardy and our progress on voting rights, healthcare, climate action, reproductive rights, and more at risk. 2. Erica is gaining massive momentum, and our movement is growing fast. Democratic allies, organizations, and leaders across the country are throwing their full support behind our campaign — from Congresswoman Katie Porter to Democracy for America and Planned Parenthood to Sunrise Movement. 3. Our primary election is nearly 7 weeks away, and this FEC deadline is our last chance to show everyone the strength of our campaign. Nearly 90% of congressional races are won by the candidate who has the most money — so our top opponents, super PACs, pundits, and voters will be watching our numbers to see if Erica has what it takes to defend this seat. So, that’s why we’re asking. At this critical moment for our campaign, we need a surge in small-dollar grassroots donations to emails like this one to reach our upcoming $40,000 end-of-quarter goal. **** Thank you for everything you do. — Team Erica Smith Email us: mailto: info@ericaforus.com
