name: =?utf-8?Q?Kevin=20Mullin?=
subject: Celebrating Women’s History
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KEVIN MULLIN FOR CONGRESS
body:
I wanted to reach out today to share a message about Women’s History Month as well as a critical call to action. | | | |
---
| | | Hello Peter,

I wanted to reach out today to share a message about Women’s History Month as well as a **critical call to action**.

March is a time for us all to commemorate women who shattered glass ceilings, led and innovated, and made our world a more inclusive place, and I am proud to have an incredible and diverse coalition of women leaders backing our campaign, including the heroic Congresswoman Jackie Speier.

**But this month is also a reminder that much of the gains that have been achieved for women’s equality are under threat.** [**_Click here to join me in urging the U.S. Senate to pass the Women’s Health Protection Act to protect Roe v. Wade from attempts to overturn it._**](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=133637281a&e=292fde286a)
---
| [ ](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=be3d01222d&e=292fde286a)
---
| [SIGN PETITION NOW](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=19d447f2cc&e=292fde286a "SIGN PETITION NOW")
---
| In the Assembly, I’ve been a champion of equality. I’m honored to have helped pass landmark legislation to strengthen the guarantee of equal pay for equal work and authored and passed multiple laws to make it easier to access childcare for all Californians.

I’m proud to have earned a 100% legislative score in 2021 from Planned Parenthood Affiliates of California, and to have co-authored a bill in the legislature that would prevent insurance companies from imposing deductibles or cost-sharing requirements on abortion care, eliminating one of the biggest obstacles to care.

With the passage of draconian anti-abortion laws in Texas and Florida, and the Supreme Court’s signal that it is likely to overturn Roe v. Wade, we have a lot of work to do. From marching in the streets to passing legislation in Congress to codify Roe v. Wade, we must all rally to preserve the progress that’s been made and strive for true equality.

That’s why, on my first day in Congress, I will stand proud with California Congresswoman Judy Chu to co-sponsor the Women's Health Protection Act that would make Roe v. Wade the law of the land. The House passed this bill last Fall 218-211, but it has stalled in the Senate, **[so I need your help to keep up the pressure.](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=82c7e27e66&e=292fde286a)**

[_**Peter, I’m asking you to please sign this petition to urge Senate Democrats to send the Women’s Health Protection Act to President Biden’s desk,_now_.**_](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=2aafcdde8a&e=292fde286a)
---
| [SIGN PETITION NOW](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=7e5889cda9&e=292fde286a "SIGN PETITION NOW")
---
| [ ](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=7e1aacb047&e=292fde286a)
---
[ ](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=acf2f82c1c&e=292fde286a)
---
| Thank you,

Kevin Mullin
---
| | |
> Kevin Mullin is THE proven progressive running for California's 15th Congressional District. Jackie Speier has endorsed Kevin to succeed her in Congress, and CalMatters voted him Most Progressive Member of the California Assembly.
>
> Kevin will fight to protect our democracy and our planet. Kevin co-authored the landmark law automatically registering Californians to vote and to ban dark money from campaigns. Kevin secured the largest climate resiliency investment in California history.
>
> Help us turbo charge Kevin's campaign for Congress by being an initial donor!
>
> Democrats have a slim hold on Congress and every seat counts, and thats why Congresswoman Jackie Speier trusts Kevin Mullin to be the progressive with a proven record of results to replace her in California's 15th Congressional District.
>
> To donate via mail please address a check to:
>
> Kevin Mullin for Congress
> PO BOX 869
> BELMONT, CA 94002
---
| | |
---
| | | | | | [](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=e0e95bcfce&e=292fde286a)
---
| | [](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=c3ff4fc85e&e=292fde286a)
---
| | [](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=82f8b35ab7&e=292fde286a)
---
| | [](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=cbab11cbfd&e=292fde286a)

You can [update your preferences](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=709d6a1a15&e=292fde286a&c=da3e3bbf19) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=709d6a1a15&e=292fde286a&c=da3e3bbf19).

we celebrated the tremendous men and women across Alabama who keep our nation fed and clothed. Agriculture is the largest industry in our state, and we are grateful for our farmers and cattlemen every day of the year! Food security is national security, and I’ll always support Alabama’s family farmers and cattlemen in the Senate! [**LIKE AND SHARE POST**](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=d901f9fe80ed455081116c62750c9e6c&_e=8gIL6euqyCMtb0nVsGc2_eC2yPa9Ux44lEj5_k9dQ1RALnp4BWD4UDxZawdE-7UR5-ljeavPLcmJaFY4erqeiN03ssYRjfr6WjSVYldxF2-oosMlFevtqISu0Vyj-s5xyldzccHCBYeV-NSvH6Jx9Hnp8IiCq0q_6wWvu66FLLqVXkWNJoe2UdB7HW_o61gPhS1me6VXdyOLF766ElGXBxV-kzri7TswqzXc2-8vSSSxYCWu-LzvXt-51deVvZjNf84ZWZ2oqUDgcrvmozXF7wlqvYRgkixd7f1-af7En3CVDl5iCb8MFxKCqNUoEbyp) **League of Southeastern Credit Unions Endorses Katie** [](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=d901f9fe80ed455081116c62750c9e6c&_e=8gIL6euqyCMtb0nVsGc2_eC2yPa9Ux44lEj5_k9dQ1RALnp4BWD4UDxZawdE-7URfHaWY2nM3z9M9bCT5p9C1iQ5lXJG_D3QBWGvZh5ubzKQkJTM1IgpEra23O0ijcv_hMboWacoob0oAOkSJMWJVvzY5ogd4utfqvs9jtkyyvI0O94EahmiDU-H3FFLm87coRMGhDkotdRV0bvHmW2FE4TuxWWpMFdPQzl5lSknDToTUGRAqTkFyci9cvMGcmDnAEk8onE-Cy08Rpxw5n97dsQS8B-Rs-o5ZhjXTGz4AMWXdFO_YnJlmH0enRfERBJc) In the Senate, I will continue to fight so that hardworking Alabama families and small businesses can thrive across our state, no matter their zip code. I will work tirelessly to cut burdensome regulations, slash red tape, and lower taxes so that Alabamians can seize opportunity and succeed free of government obstruction. clean_body: OFFICIAL BRITT FOR ALABAMA NEWSLETTER **National Wildlife Federation Endorses Katie Britt Excited to announce the endorsement of the in light of turkey season opening in Alabama this week! “(Katie) has been a leader on the Alabama Wildlife Federation’s Board of Directors and will be a strong advocate for ensuring our wildlife and outdoor heritage thrive for future generations. “She has the experience and leadership skills to deliver results for Alabama’s hunters, anglers, hikers, bird watchers, and outdoor recreationists from the mountains to the Gulf Coast and everywhere in between.” Read more here: Katie Celebrates National Agriculture Day On , we celebrated the tremendous men and women across Alabama who keep our nation fed and clothed. Agriculture is the largest industry in our state, and we are grateful for our farmers and cattlemen every day of the year! Food security is national security, and I’ll always support Alabama’s family farmers and cattlemen in the Senate! League of Southeastern Credit Unions Endorses Katie In the Senate, I will continue to fight so that hardworking Alabama families and small businesses can thrive across our state, no matter their zip code. I will work tirelessly to cut burdensome regulations, slash red tape, and lower taxes so that Alabamians can seize opportunity and succeed free of government obstruction. Together, we will preserve the American Dream and build a strong future for our children and our children’s children! Associated Builders & Contractors of Alabama Endorses Katie I am proud to have the endorsement of the . I will always fight to build an environment that rewards these traits and allows Alabama families to thrive in safe, strong communities. body:

Take it from Kim, Peter: we can't hold the House majority without winning Washington's 8th District – and we're not the only ones who know it. **_Sabato's Crystal Ball_ said that our district is one of the country's "top bellwether seats this cycle."**

To protect our House majority, it's crucial we re-elect Kim this November – but it won't be easy.

Republicans only need to flip five seats to retake the House majority, and they've named Kim a top target. After redistricting, election experts are calling our race a "toss-up," meaning Kim's in for her toughest race yet.

We're approaching our first FEC end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of the election year, and we set an ambitious goal to ensure we have the resources to win this "toss-up" race. But we can't get there without the support of this grassroots team!

clean_body: Hear it from Kim herself = Take it from Kim, Peter: we can't hold the House majority without winning Washington's 8th District – and we're not the only ones who know it. Sabato's Crystal Ball said that our district is one of the country's "top bellwether seats this cycle." To protect our House majority, it's crucial we re-elect Kim this November – but it won't be easy. Republicans only need to flip five seats to retake the House majority, and they've named Kim a top target. After redistricting, election experts are calling our race a "toss-up," meaning Kim's in for her toughest race yet. We're approaching our first FEC end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of the election year, and we set an ambitious goal to ensure we have the resources to win this "toss-up" race. But we can't get there without the support of this grassroots team! = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = Thanks, Team Schrier To hold the House majority, we must re-elect Rep. body:

Peter,

I'm reaching out to you because your 2022 Sustaining Membership expired and you only have 24 hours left to renew it!

name: Beto for Texas
subject: We’re sharing our actual progress so you can see for yourself
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
[1]Beto O'Rourke

We know that we’ve already sent you a few emails about our big deadline
coming up on Thursday night.

Here’s why this is so important: We still have millions of Texas voters to
reach, persuade, and mobilize. That’s why our end-of-quarter fundraising
push is so critical — because we need enough grassroots resources to make
it happen.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54361?refcode=ema20220326-182178&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1047&akid=182178%2E444211%2EPqkQt_ ]Meeting this goal is not only a sign of strength, it could genuinely
make or break our chances in this race — so we’re seeing if you can help.
Please, if you can make a donation of $2.85 or any amount
before this end-of-quarter deadline, will you do it right now?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54361?refcode=ema20220326-182178&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1048&akid=182178%2E444211%2EPqkQt_ ][IMG]

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54361?refcode=ema20220326-182178&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1067&akid=182178%2E444211%2EPqkQt_ ]Contribute $2.85

Raising millions of dollars with small-dollar donations — and without
taking a dime from corporate PACs or special interests — is how we elect

subject: Another super-honest email

body:
We talk a lot about FEC fundraising deadlines, so we wanted to take a moment to explain why they are so important to Mark Kelly’s chances.
#

Friends —
We talk a lot about FEC fundraising deadlines, so we wanted to take a moment to explain why they are so important to Mark Kelly’s chances.
When an FEC deadline ends, candidates are legally required to report how much money they’ve raised. Right now, our opponents don’t know what we’ve raised. And we don’t know what they’ve raised either.
There could be campaigns, PACs, or dark money groups that have raised absurd amounts of money and are ready to spring it on us. That could mean attacks ads on TV, on radio, online, billboards — even blimps. Seriously.
We have to raise everything we can so we’re prepared to fight back.
At the same time, outside groups will be looking to see what we’ve raised. They’ll want to know if we’re vulnerable. If we are, they’re more likely to attack. But if we file a strong report, they’ll be less likely to attack.
That’s why these deadlines are so important — strategically and practically. We look at all these reports and make budget decisions.
And since these emails are the primary way Mark Kelly’s campaign raises money, it means we have to ask:
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to Mark Kelly’s re-election campaign before this critical FEC fundraising deadline ends in just a few days? We would not ask if it were not so important.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-mar22?refcode=em220326-1-7&t=1&refcode2=2448_6688874_0gBiID&akid=2448%2E6688874%2E0gBiID)

Hi friend,

Four years ago, Greg won a difficult battle to secure his Congressional seat, helping Democrats win back control of the House.

That majority proved to be a crucial tool. With Greg in office, we were able to check the Trump administration's abuses of power. Under the Biden administration, Greg has helped pass pivotal laws that have made people's lives better - laws like the American Rescue Plan and the Bipartisan Infrastructure Act.

In 2022, our House majority, that has delivered so much for our country, could be in jeopardy. If we want to save it, we need to make sure Greg wins this race.

[**Hitting our end-of-quarter goal before our deadline in five days is CRUCIAL to Greg 's reelection. Will you make sure he wins reelection in November by chipping in now?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/k-RNlRJdIHSJeuQ0BwLUu50JmklzY_-ls-wOPtXAE-s=/FTKMxFVDLsPWJOpr3QW8_-PBv6THGGPRvySXfztEbKY=?refcode=X_032622_EOQ_B)

With Greg in office, we were able to check the Trump administration's abuses of power. Under the Biden administration, Greg has helped pass pivotal laws that have made people's lives better - laws like the American Rescue Plan and the Bipartisan Infrastructure Act. In 2022, our House majority, that has delivered so much for our country, could be in jeopardy. If we want to save it, we need to make sure Greg wins this race. Thank you! -- Team Greg Paid for by Stanton for Congress Stanton for Congress 4340 E Indian School Rd. Suite 21-518 Phoenix AZ 85018 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please=.

| Dear Friend, I'm honored to have the endorsement of the Founder of [VCDL](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VUaw0hZ8bntZdCp61OMlBreQV1oLoZKJSWIcPIF1oAXU4LmV3VVL6Ko5wVMXXR0gRHF-elZV2uX_dJkyx86dj_FIjYSTU_wFiRzHNMkSH_bFsYaHf7icKd7C9GQU_EI_RzGL8LcWE9rEYmYI_Zoa1A==&c=wX67AgD5GvCvfXjuwDzGF9Cp_8aqrvgFfFdgV4wwkMc4QYSe4lxGZw==&ch=74yHBOxLE9MP7XoQ86M58uyIiVLzyIYaM4YCpAb9XeiPrwIdegHfxQ==) and former Orange County GOP Chair Paul Moog in my campaign for 2023 to be Virginia State Senator District 10!
Without our 2nd amendment we would lose our other God Given Freedoms enshrined in our Constitution. I often ask our friends on the other side of the isle, what part of shall not be infringed do you not understand? I'm proud of earning the highest rating from VCDL and the 100% score they award me in the House of Delegates each year (2018-2022).
As a current Member of the House of Delegates, I know first hand how important it is we win back the Virginia State Senate. I invite you and your friends to join me in this cause. Hope to see you around the district! -John
---

name: Dick Durbin
subject: Did you watch this week’s hearing?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
Peter,
Did you watch this week’s hearing?
Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson has finished three days of testimony, and what we’re witnessing is history in the making.
115 Justices have served in the history of the Supreme Court. 108 have been white men – just two men of color – and only five women, just one of color. When confirmed, Judge Jackson will be the first Black woman.
I say “when confirmed” because this is Judge Jackson’s fourth time facing the Senate, and the previous three times she has passed muster, notably with bipartisan support less than one year ago.
Judge Jackson has the backing of the legal community with the American Bar Association rating her unanimously “Well Qualified” and she also has the backing of law enforcement, notably from the Fraternal Order of Police.
But even with all the broad and bipartisan support Judge Jackson has, we wouldn’t be in this moment if it wasn’t for a Democratic Majority in the Senate and Joe Biden in the White House.
So let me once again say thank you for all you have done to support me and other Democrats leading up to this moment – and if you can, **[contribute $5 now to reelect our Democratic Senate majority this year.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43414455/337087590/1901419541?refcode=dd_em_220326_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDQ0NDUwNC0yMmFkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vKBsxau4iCxcEF0iOdoJ9k2epAkaD7Y_NShMDNqKIJM=)**

My best,
Dick Durbin

Peter,

I’ve been incredibly lucky to receive support from so many Conservative patriots since launching my campaign. And boy do I need it.

I am in the fight of my life to be Connecticut’s next _Republican_ Senator and to oust a career politician _with a massive (and growing) bank account._ It’s no easy feat, but I’m up for the challenge, because I know it will be worth it when a **red wave** sweeps through the nation this November.

**Which leads me to why I’m emailing you today:** [**I’m reaching out to each and every conservative warrior who is tired of politicians putting America last – and asking that they personally endorse my campaign for election immediately.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8ad359db51b24ed6bf42365160fd443b&_e=1QzqJLBKIhrXswXTKFAyd0JbrNZ4NJvXRk51S8GqfZ5UfCNiI8Z319qNJHwvRx3ukq_dj2NmCRaEDEGTVvgzYUIVbDdeeJQq_O61CCvblYyocK6UxKx7WB-K18ID0gM75pF51BFtvhPGb4LmWlJrY62-e_aW0O-SPQx-puQufzggV27FMXeLCvzrk8pTJJ7m0xct2g-tFuIYai7YzJkJBl3Rtng6u5GN_smgBlCA48DFBw9_MVFGmPcKkAHfBLLVrNQl9VNCGxkF1DDw0CFQvHeOGjILVi3oPoTBI0YfpsenYeWNKsPCaRqksTji6z7vIojjGqnLvJ_v56PkllpJ1dQE3RJCPt6kAK9w-RLyXoLi2zicKLoSgQhi2QcCzqaLB6LD0jDqXEbea5gvVO8PgYr6we0_mpw1_cqD0PrKclRiSvx1Olf8aHqvsC90NTHHV91A2OiF7bw_tDY-hn4k_ybN0CwvX2U2bue9EVN1QeF_xDYZzcfiZYkhagBaFXSZxO4djppqY-wpL6BQiWnOQOS0Fy3mResNrmyxLSKPFQ-ADTWlbKjoofQt6oE1m4CejgBudBg3gFK2MPPdZi1tgw%3D%3D)

You already know that I would do anything to protect prosperity and defend freedom here in America – _otherwise I wouldn’t be running for a seat in the Senate._

As an immigrant from communist Cuba, a proud mother, wife, and a businesswoman, it breaks my heart to see what President Biden and his enablers (like my opponent) have done to this country. name: Glenn Beck
subject: We’re rushing support to Ukraine. You can help.
body:
When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes more dangerous. Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentimes
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkr54en5t1bnls4v5nm2k94bjm3pmadq5lkh2mjg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbojfdb3mdjm4t5gm1r60t36cgqefc5jmqoe6cjhedob0slic1oj1pj4eepm2tjgcv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti61j70s5jcdjr4sr66aob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5gecoj3cdj69oh5u)
| | | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z035t9nqep9q203o8iapjere3qaebhpemhfnm1jo_rp22sh2s8i66ob0sph66or6cjh2bs)
---
|
---
Fellow American,

When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes more dangerous.

Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentimes, they do.

We saw it last year when Afghanistan fell to the Taliban and within moments, terror and despair took over our television screens.

**Now, we are seeing a similar situation play out in Ukraine** , where as a result of naked Russian aggression, millions of people are now in need of emergency aid.

Fortunately, we are not powerless.

**Right now, my nonprofit Mercury One is working hand-in-hand with our partners on the ground to provide direct humanitarian aid and medical care** on the border of Ukraine – and I am reaching out with an urgent request for your help.

**[As we work to help as many civilians as we can, please rush as large a donation as possible to our Humanitarian Fund right now.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfqjst7q01pufmd368hrr86adsslnu0roc5sampg_rp22sh2s8i66ob0sph66or6cjh2bs)**
|

|
---
Last year, in conjunction with our partners, Mercury One raised over $40 million to rescue over 12,500 at-risk individuals from Afghanistan including American citizens and persecuted Christians.

To have been able to play a part in a lifesaving mission of such magnitude is something I will never forget. But beyond that, it was an incredible learning experience which will help us be even more effective in the future.

**And the future is here. Right now, the mission is Ukraine. These brave people need our prayers, but they also need our direct support.**

**[So please, rush a donation to the help those in need in the crisis in Ukraine.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8okk9fd4drud6ac546oeoiojqntssllfev19edo_rp22sh2s8i66ob0sph66or6cjh2bs)**

Thank you for your generosity, and your willingness to act.

Laus Deo,

Glenn Beck

name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: Big Tech is getting fussy with me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2rs41au3ap9reraubm185mig1a7qofnbmgvjcp0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbp72plk6qon8tlnm1hm2djksoqn1dbimtj7as3ks4qm2or4s5jr7cr46di3epr0sv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66ljjadhnmar6cc9n6dgefc5lclp238h1e8he4933c5gecoj3cdg68oh5u)
Why does YouTube hate to hear the truth?

| [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z67fvt6lrjkj1fk1lp1h9qtn2mmn5s146pu4gr3o_rp22sh2s8i66ob0sph66or0chh2bs)

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zmgqfq5um26hpgnagj9an2rgf14db9rokrtk2q98_rp22sh2s8i66ob0sph66or0chh2bs)

Folks,

**I can’t say I’m surprised by YouTube taking down all of the wonderful speeches I got to hear, along with mine, off of their website.**

It’s a shame they took down my speech, I thought it was one of my better speeches.

**Unfortunately, Big Tech tends to get fussy whenever conservative voices start telling the truth, and their only option is to silence and cancel us.**

## **I’VE HAD ENOUGH.**

**[Rush your support for Conservative Voices before they try to silence us for good!](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zkkqjduahe7clalot0qrn0dqul4nq1f0spgha7jg_rp22sh2s8i66ob0sph66or0chh2bs)**

---

---
[**$250 TO SUPPORT CONSERVATIVE VOICES**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8f2mp9l1il2q45144kqvgpgd92hnnpp9siao41o_rp22sh2s8i66ob0sph66or0chh2bs)
---
[**$500 TO SUPPORT CONSERVATIVE VOICES**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zo4ognvvu2iprug9vukovhu0m9lfuiq8unbd5i2g_rp22sh2s8i66ob0sph66or0chh2bs)
---

One of the greatest things about America, besides a hot dog on the Fourth of July, is freedom of speech. **Big Tech companies should not be able to silence those they don’t agree with.**

**[I need your support in promoting conservative voices! We cannot let YouTube and the rest of Silicon Valley walk all over us!](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4a2uat5u0kforcbnl2nc8i9ur4dk3tlgp5mi4h0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0sph66or0chh2bs)**

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: This week was truly historic
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=NvbntBhqu%2FuBig0DcdxSiPcvuq4mzBGY&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
_Historic._ It's a word often overused in Congress, Friend, but this week truly merits it.
[ ](https://petitions.signforgood.com/blumenthal-SCOTUS-2022-Jackson?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1160-su-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fblumenthal-SCOTUS-2022%3Fcode%3Djtk1160-su-nd)
**During her Supreme Court confirmation hearings, Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson gave the most skillful, insightful, and candid responses that I 've seen in my close to 12 years in the Senate. **
As a member of the Senate Judiciary Committee, it was an honor and a privilege to ask a nominee with such persuasive intellect, varied professional background, and strategic grace, about her judicial record. Judge Jackson will not only make the Court look more like America, but think more like America too.
As expected, some Senate Republicans used these hearings as an opportunity for shameless sideshows and distractions. They knew that there was no way to discount Judge Jackson's extraordinary intellect and character, nor her diverse personal and professional experience, so they launched irrelevant stunts in an attempt to get under her skin. But they failed.
In fact, a new Gallup poll shows that 58% of Americans agree that the Senate should confirm Judge Jackson to the bench. We cannot take any chances, though - not with Mitch McConnell and the GOP caucus's history of torpedoing Supreme Court nominations.
**That 's why I'm looking for at least 5,000 members of this team to join me in showing support for Judge Jackson's confirmation before midnight tonight. Her voice would be critical on issues like reproductive freedom, voting rights, gun safety, and more, so it's imperative to know where you stand:**
[**If you believe that the Senate should confirm Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson to the Supreme Court, please add your name now.**](https://petitions.signforgood.com/blumenthal-SCOTUS-2022-Jackson?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1160-su-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fblumenthal-SCOTUS-2022%3Fcode%3Djtk1160-su-nd)
Thank you,
Dick
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=ayYG9yHr4jV9zIR8McZ8cvcvuq4mzBGY&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)
Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

name: Team Slotkin
subject: Trump is heading back to Michigan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress
body:
Elissa Slotkin for Congresshttps://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220326&amount=28 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220326&amount=28]
Team,
We wanted to make sure you saw: Donald Trump is heading back to Michigan.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220326&amount=28 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220326&amount=28]
This will be his first stop in the state since he lost in 2020 — he’s coming in support of two statewide Republican candidates, one of whom has peddled conspiracy theories about voter fraud. His visit has him stopping in Macomb county in suburban Detroit, and it will be interesting to see which other GOP politicians show up to greet the former president.
Trump’s trip is a good reminder that House candidates won’t be the only thing on Michiganders’ ballots on Election Day . Our top statewide elected officials – the Governor, Attorney General, and Secretary of State – are on the ‘top of the ticket’. Right now, these seats are all held by Democrats, and Republicans are eager to flip them as they look toward the next Presidential election in 2024.
This reaffirms what we already know: all eyes will be on Michigan this November, because it’s often the canary in the coal mine for political trends. It also reaffirms that Elissa is going to need a lot of support as she runs in the most competitive House race in Michigan — and one of the most competitive in the entire country. She is ready and willing to do her part, but we’d love your help to push us forward as we approach our March 31 fundraising deadline.
Will you chip in today to fight back against national [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220326&amount=28] Republicans looking to flip Michigan from blue to red? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220326&amount=28]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220326&amount=28]

name: Kina Collins
subject: The paradox for Black women in politics
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KINA COLLINS FOR CONGRESS** ](https://u1584542
body:
After everything we’ve seen this week, we are exhausted | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yOQozAy4249GfohatM8XLCP7Gyf6bzrkjN8sXh_JjXvDm21fvmGLhqUe-quR3_x0a4ZLzkfrFqdtVKuNIuwQsn0c91jgEdSA5OANsq926BffC7faAQGaBY74u73WFJVk4sCpPQ-q_QTvWBASpFaL5ZY-OToe097rtW-aBDE6e-yt_V8hX8tXBfW14GVC6SddS4HuaWA7jbSq1dyw0s0Poi66rvYIhgD2hcqXIh4ubsXScPV42JKB5pk4f_kwZbEIENoFnOpIR6tw_g-ix000KNOozU08G-zKXJJzVGq3MjOvGWmcV91NjwABSEOzSIShMg07cH_S-jK3dBD-RoDyLcBgjjARwVhZn-ZxEx_Xt25Q/3ko/U3lQVMkmRg6F5175Kw8fNw/h0/HuuQfn_KbeJJ-ejcooD8UmQRathpAM_FaC7797DyP2U) Dear Team, There is a paradox at the core of how Black women are treated in politics. As I watched Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson fight through hours of hearings, it was deeply striking to me to see the degree to which she was expected to answer for every grievance, to patiently endure every condescension, and intelligently and gracefully unpack every loaded trap the Republican party created. She is expected to be the best. While at the same time, Black women are expected to be the pragmatic voters who “get it done” for the Democratic party and choose from the options they are given. We are expected to be graceful, patient, and hard working as we generously mobilize every member of our ranks to defend a Democratic majority in halls of power where we aren’t even represented. There are no Black women in the Senate. **I am tired of being told my value is as a foot soldier in someone else’s army. Black women are qualified, we are talented, we are ready to lead, and we are already working harder than most career politicians, just to be considered.** **[We have just 5 days left to raise the money needed to prove, once again, that Black women are viable candidates. Can you help me get clean_body: After everything we’ve seen this week, we are exhausted | | | Dear Team, There is a paradox at the core of how Black women are treated in politics. As I watched Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson fight through hours of hearings, it was deeply striking to me to see the degree to which she was expected to answer for every grievance, to patiently endure every condescension, and intelligently and gracefully unpack every loaded trap the Republican party created. She is expected to be the best. While at the same time, Black women are expected to be the pragmatic voters who “get it done” for the Democratic party and choose from the options they are given. We are expected to be graceful, patient, and hard working as we generously mobilize every member of our ranks to defend a Democratic majority in halls of power where we aren’t even represented. There are no Black women in the Senate. I am tired of being told my value is as a foot soldier in someone else’s army. Black women are qualified, we are talented, we are ready to lead, and we are already working harder than most career politicians, just to be considered. you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: The truth is, everybody knows how qualified Black women are. They know, because they throw everything they have at us to try and keep us from power. But a handful of racist Senators didn't stop us in the past and it's not gonna stop us now.. In solidarity, Kina Collins | To give by check: Kina Collins for Congress 901 Lake Street, Unit 4093 Oak Park, IL 60301

name: John Fetterman
subject: A single vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
It all came down to *three* provisional ballots.
#
True story, Derek: **I legitimately won my first election by a *single* vote.**
I’ll tell you the whole story, but first I’m wondering if there’s any chance you could **[please make your very first $5 donation to help our campaign meet our fundraising goal before the end-of-quarter FEC deadline on Wednesday?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45948?refcode=em20220326-5138&t=1&akid=5138%2E434096%2EwuqTmo)**
Serving as Mayor of Braddock, Pennsylvania for 13 years was the greatest honor of my life. But the truth is that it almost didn’t happen at all.
Back in May 2005, the Democratic primary for Mayor of Braddock was locked in a dead heat. Winning the primary meant everything, because no other candidates were on the November ballot. **Whoever won the primary became the next mayor.**
Unfortunately, Election Day didn't bring a clear winner. The unofficial results showed a tie for the mayoral nomination between me and one other opponent. The absentee ballots had all been counted, but the write-ins were still outstanding. So we went into a recount.
It was a month before the results were finally certified. **In the end, it all came down to *three* provisional ballots cast in Braddock’s 2nd Ward.**
The first ballot was rejected because the voter wasn't registered. The second ballot only counted for countywide races, because the voter wasn't registered in Braddock.
But the third voter was registered in Braddock — and ultimately, **they cast the single deciding vote that elected me Mayor of Braddock.** The joke I never get tired of is that I voted for myself. 😂 Here’s the actual headline in the Pittsburgh Post-Gazette from 16 years ago:
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45948?refcode=em20220326-5138&t=2&akid=5138%2E434096%2EwuqTmo)
Derek, I’m telling you this story a few days from our end-of-quarter FEC deadline to show you just how critical reaching every single voter in this Democratic primary for U.S. Senate is. **I may have won my first election by a *single* vote, but we can’t afford to lose the Pennsylvania Senate seat by a *single* vote.**
In order to reach every voter in all 67 Pennsylvania counties in the coming weeks, though, we absolutely must meet our fundraising goal through emails like this one before Wednesday at midnight. That’s why I am humbly asking:
**[Can you please make your *first-ever* $5 donation to help our campaign reach our goal before the FEC deadline on March 31?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45948?refcode=em20220326-5138&t=3&akid=5138%2E434096%2EwuqTmo)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45948?amount=5&refcode=em20220326-5138&t=22&akid=5138%2E434096%2EwuqTmo)**
From me, Gisele, + our entire family, thank you so much for supporting our campaign.
—John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220326-5138-footer&t=23&refcode2=5138_434096_wuqTmo&akid=5138%2E434096%2EwuqTmo)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=24&akid=5138%2E434096%2EwuqTmo)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=5138%2E434096%2EwuqTmo)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

#
[**Hi Friends, it’s Alessandra. I’m respectfully asking for your $5 donation to help my team and I hit our $7,349 End-of-Quarter goal.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-march/?refcode=em220326-1-60&refcode2=629_59515_gBfznT&akid=629%2E59515%2EgBfznT)
Because the amount of money we raise between now and the 31st at midnight will be publicly reported — meaning that everyone, including our Republican competitors, will be able to see.
And the Republican in this race has already raised $835,415.57, so we’ll need to catch up if we want to stay competitive.
On a personal note, it would mean a lot to know that you have my back during this critical moment.
[**So, please, pitch in $5 today to help us hit our $7,349 goal.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-march/?refcode=em220326-1-60&refcode2=629_59515_gBfznT&akid=629%2E59515%2EgBfznT)
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-march/?refcode=em220326-1-60&refcode2=629_59515_gBfznT&akid=629%2E59515%2EgBfznT)**
Truthfully, we’re facing an uphill battle. But if supporters like you are willing and able to step up during times like these, we can hit our goals and run a winning campaign.
All my best,
Alessandra

Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.alessandrabiaggi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=629%2E59515%2EgBfznT).

name: CheriBeasley.com
subject: We are humbly asking...
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
We have less than a week to go until our first FEC deadline of 2022
#

We have less than a week to go until our first FEC deadline of 2022. After it is over, we are required to publicly report our fundraising numbers, which will set the tone for the rest of this election.
Those are high stakes, and the truth is we are not on track to hit our goal. There’s still time to catch up if we can get a LOT of grassroots support right now.
[**That’s why we are humbly asking you to please make a $3 donation to Cheri Beasley today. The only way we can reach our goal before the FEC deadline is if as many people as possible pitch in.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-mar22?refcode=em220326-2-MA&refcode2=597.357359.DTEYtu&t=1&akid=597%2E357359%2EDTEYtu)
It’s important that we level with supporters like you about what we’re up against.
Yes, Cheri has won statewide twice before, but she would be the first to tell you this is the toughest campaign she’s ever faced. Senate races as important as this one are just incredibly expensive. And unlike her Republican opponents, Cheri isn’t taking a dime of corporate PAC money.
We don’t say that to scare you because Cheri has never backed down from a tough fight, but she’s counting on us not to let up or lose momentum.
[**So please, if you can, make a $3 donation to make sure we have the resources required to flip North Carolina and elect a champion for working people. Do it for Cheri and for the Senate majority. Do it because we cannot afford to miss this goal.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-mar22?refcode=em220326-2-MA&refcode2=597.357359.DTEYtu&t=2&akid=597%2E357359%2EDTEYtu)**
Thank you so much!
\- Team Beasley
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-mar22?refcode=em220326-2-MA&refcode2=597.357359.DTEYtu&t=3&akid=597%2E357359%2EDTEYtu)**

Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
PO Box 28778
Raleigh, NC 27611
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you want to receive fewer emails, you may [submit this form to get only our most important updates](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=4&akid=597%2E357359%2EDTEYtu). Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.cheribeasley.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=597%2E357359%2EDTEYtu). If you would like to support Cheri's campaign for the U.S. Senate in North Carolina, please consider [making a donation](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beasley-em-2021?refcode=em-footer&t=6&refcode2=597_357359_DTEYtu&akid=597%2E357359%2EDTEYtu) today to help us make history.

clean_body: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. name: Rep. Demings
subject: I want you to hear this directly from me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I cannot win in Florida without you
| | |
---
Friend,

I want you to hear this directly from me: I cannot win in Florida without you. **And right now, as I'm coming up short of my fundraising goal, I have nowhere else to turn. **
A poll of my race shows the numbers are close (I'm just 2 points behind Marco Rubio!). I need to surge _ahead_ , friend – _ _ and the only way to do it is by hitting my $25,000 grassroots fundraising goal. Missing this goal isn't an option.
Running a campaign in Florida is expensive – and Florida's last Senate race was decided by just 0.12 points (_10,033 votes_), so every dollar will make a difference. With Marco Rubio and the Senate Republican campaign arm pulling in a combined $33.8 million last quarter, **missing my goal could cost Floridians and our country a meaningful win.**
Grassroots supporters like you propelled my campaign launch to historic heights. _Your_ support fueled The Cook Political Report to increase my odds of winning. And this grassroots team is the reason political pundits across the board are saying I have what it takes to defeat Sen. Marco Rubio.
So, friend, here I am, writing to you again. I know you hear a lot from me, but it's only because I _trust_ you and _believe_ that I can't do this without you. Please, if you can spare any donation before midnight to close our fundraising gap, it would mean the world to me.
Here's the best link: [**https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vd_senate-fr-email**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43420132/337117837/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2753-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTUxNTU4Ny00YWFkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C54vUZnDsLoCeQCQD1P6_YMYHP_o0RhelWNhqFkafE4=)
Thank you so much for your support,

Val Demings

clean_body: I cannot win in Florida without you | | | Friend, I want you to hear this directly from me: I cannot win in Florida without you. And right now, as I'm coming up short of my fundraising goal, I have nowhere else to turn. A poll of my race shows the numbers are close (I'm just 2 points behind Marco Rubio!). I need to surge ahead , friend – and the only way to do it is by hitting my $25,000 grassroots fundraising goal. Missing this goal isn't an option. Running a campaign in Florida is expensive – and Florida's last Senate race was decided by just 0.12 points (10,033 votes), so every dollar will make a difference. With Marco Rubio and the Senate Republican campaign arm pulling in a combined $33.8 million last quarter, missing my goal could cost Floridians and our country a meaningful win. Grassroots supporters like you propelled my campaign launch to historic heights. Your support fueled The Cook Political Report to increase my odds of winning. And this grassroots team is the reason political pundits across the board are saying I have what it takes to defeat Sen. Marco Rubio. So, friend, here I am, writing to you again. I know you hear a lot from me, but it's only because I trust you and believe that I can't do this without you. Please, if you can spare any donation before midnight to close our fundraising gap, it would mean the world to me. clean_body: Our upcoming quarterly deadline is now a make-or-break moment. | Friend – I wanted to be sure you saw my earlier message on the Office of Special Counsel’s bombshell report. The report PROVES what I’ve been saying since DAY ONE:The Wisconsin Elections Commission broke the law in the guidance they issued during the 2020 election. And while Tony Evers continues to veto every election integrity bill that comes across his desk, you have my word, I will ALWAYS fight to ensure YOUR VOTE counts. But with our FIRST end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of the election year right around the corner, we’re pacing $39,185 behind on our Q1 goal. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Former Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin Republican Candidate for Governor \- - - - Forwarded Message - - - - From: Rebecca Kleefisch Date: Thu, March 24, 2022 Subject: BREAKING REPORT: Office of Special Counsel To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend – you have to see this: The Office of Special Counsel’s report PROVES what we were saying all along in our lawsuit against the WEC for their unlawful guidance in the 2020 election. Now, to ensure future elections are FREE and FAIR, I’m counting on your critical support to win this toss-up governor’s race and take back Wisconsin from the radical Left. Even with the highest court in our state refusing to uphold the law and take up our case against the WEC, I vowed I would never stop fighting for what’s right: ensuring YOUR vote counts. That’s why I’ve already committed to creating a new Office of Election Integrity & Public Trust Unit within the state Department of Justice when I’m governor. But first, we must fire radical liberal Tony Evers who has VETOED every election integrity bill that has come across his desk. When I’m governor, you have my word Friend, our elections will be secure. But I can’t take back our state without YOU fighting by my side. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Former Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin Republican Candidate for Governor Paid for by People for Rebecca. PO Box 628284, Middleton, WI 53562

name: Team Marshall for Congress
subject: Building a WINNING movement
body:
| | |
---
Peter, We have some great news to share. **As of today, we have raised more in March than we had by this point in any other month since we launched!** We are definitely ready to celebrate, but the fact of the matter is that we have to stay on the ball for the next 6 days to make sure we reach our goal.
**This month’s target is our highest to date and reflects the increasing expenses we have on the campaign** as this race heats up and we get closer and closer to our primary. But right now, **we’re only 75% of the way to our ambitious goal** , and we need to pull out all the stops to reach it.
---
---
Derek is the candidate that California’s new 23rd district deserves as their next representative. **In Washington, DC, Derek will go to bat for the people of this district and for working people all over the country.** He is the progressive, capable, committed leader we need in Congress. **[If you agree with us that we need to replace the Trump-endorsed Republican incumbent and elect Derek Marshall, donate right now to support his grassroots campaign. subject: This Is A BIG Week!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Jeff Warner For Congress
body:
Your support makes a BIG difference. | | | |
---
|
# **Announcement**
---
| | |
##
26 March 22

Campaigns follow monthly and quarterly cycles. Since the end of the March is the end of the first quarter, the next five days are really an important time to receive campaign donations. Campaigns are evaluated, in part, by financial strength.

Jeff Warner is very grateful for your generous and sacrificial support. While our campaign is off to a great and historic start, we have a long way to go. Please consider making an end of quarter donation today.

We're praying for $6000 to help us print street signage for the upcoming primary.

You may make a donation online through your credit card, electronic check or PayPal.

Donations may also be made by check payable to Jeff Warner For Congress and mail it to the address in the footer.

Thank You for your consideration, prayers and support.

**[Donate Here](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=bc10ff6707&e=12a37459a2)**

Remember, Jeff Warner is standing with you and for you. Enough is Enough! Together, "_We The People_ " can make a _real_ difference. Now is our time to act. There is hope.

Please share this announcement with others.

Standing with you,

Jeff
---
| [Jeff Warner For Congress Website](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=60109ebfa4&e=12a37459a2 "Jeff Warner For Congress Website")

Folks,

When did it become so hard for people to decipher between a **_Man_** and a **_Woman?_**

These days it seems like just about anyone and everyone can get up one day and decide to be a different gender depending on the weather. **_Unfortunately, we have a Supreme Court nominee who can’t give me or anyone else a straight answer as to what is a woman._**

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=bb025bc021a34376ae9c235d6183d929&_e=17wwHYaPkbsXCLfwXWR4xCVPFZRWkX3IwQdawgAOJZ9CEl1-kWh01PnlkW316oyeBNfidg1FtTkHABlfOc9bB3eIDWxk7tSI-WTx04KV6WYTnnxKeNXBaksThK4HebhlUlAFs3hNQuphH5iUdvQvCtvXzpax6SsOSpvG9YVoMXtnAIjHdREq-MIKBUKrHo1XP5enPnZASuwezxscHBF0FoyqL9ucu6V1iacb96Rytmb-JSYTrOa2HUrDU8wr7XjuzEEpihfAriS6JbloLvz4kbgeav7a7eaCuM4GmQzJO_M-7GFX3_8WgWUylrHSo5sjFZ5cJfZxqth7KpOFoWbdLxO6PbgxeSrkPteNwKNfKvgBpaxZpTKk1gjNnYgN8SSRbihTYDL-F0rwsZ0LSVhw4Ma4H3DxkBX5dUvpkn2aCWmqKJfu7_BjrUfxYdVkrcS4ZT3Q7FguFXwA3k3nRE-nbg%3D%3D)

Fellow American,

We need ONE SEAT...

...only ONE SEAT to flip the Senate to Republican control.

That's why we are emailing you today. We need your help.

While the GOP candidates in our race are focused on attacking one another and currying favor with National Republicans, I remain focused on the issues that matter most to Washington families in the 4th District.

From fighting for affordable housing and healthcare, to securing our water sources, to strengthening our economy, to improving education – **I know Washingtonians want a representative who prioritizes solving problems over picking petty political fights.**

clean_body: | | Hi there! I wanted to introduce myself – I’m Lindsey Keesling, Doug’s new Campaign Manager for his race to flip Washington’s Fourth Congressional District from red to blue. I wanted to make sure you had a chance to read Doug’s email from yesterday about how important our upcoming FEC filing deadline is. = Thanks so much – I couldn’t be more excited to be part of the team that’s going to bring real leadership back to WA-04! – Lindsey BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE: FIRST: Donald Trump announced his endorsement of Loren Culp, one of my two far-right opponents here in WA-04 who, if elected, would become the most extreme member of Congress. THEN: Republicans went into disarray, breaking with Trump to back our other far-right opponent and abandoning incumbent Dan Newhouse altogether. NOW: We have a real shot at flipping this district from red to blue, and all eyes will be on our upcoming Federal Election Commission (FEC) report to see if we have the grassroots support needed to win. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | = | = | = | = | = | = While the GOP candidates in our race are focused on attacking one another and currying favor with National Republicans, I remain focused on the issues that matter most to Washington families in the 4th District. From fighting for affordable housing and healthcare, to securing our water sources, to strengthening our economy, to improving education – I know Washingtonians want a representative who prioritizes solving problems over picking petty political fights. = Thanks so much for being a part of this important effort! Doug | PAID FOR BY DOUG WHITE FOR CONGRESS Doug White for Congress PO Box 9674 Yakima, WA 98909 United States Doug White is running to represent Washington’s 4th Congressional District in Congress. body:

| | **_[This is the most important ask I’ve ever made of you. The National Republican Campaign Committee has more money in the bank right now than it’s EVER had. The House GOP is sitting on $82 MILLION. I need a historic response -- 2,408 gifts before midnight - to protect our Democratic Majority and show Republicans once and for all that they will NEVER win. Can I count on your $15 before my midnight deadline? >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43420517/337120076/1694517773?refcode=20220326_em_fr_b2_pelosi_30_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmMzOTgxNi01MGFkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m0SrDBZKZLqWVTVr5cgUT8NULxvg0pq2XCLzfd8T-Ro=)_** It’s time for you to make a critical choice. \-- We can either sit back while GOP mega-donors shovel millions of dollars to Trump allies so Republicans take back our House and pave the way for Trump to come back into power... \-- Or, we can stand together, fight back against the GOP’s attacks, and show Trump he’ll NEVER steal our House. [**Trump is watching this election. If the GOP wins control of the House, he will run for president again.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43420518/337120077/1694517773?refcode=20220326_em_fr_b2_pelosi_30_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmMzOTgxNi01MGFkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m0SrDBZKZLqWVTVr5cgUT8NULxvg0pq2XCLzfd8T-Ro=) We can’t let that happen. I won’t let it. I will fight with everything I’ve got to protect my Democrats and keep our House. But I can’t do it on my own. I can’t do it when the House GOP is armed with $82 MILLION to defeat us. name: Kevin Kiley
subject: What happened on Thursday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Congress 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
|
---
Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [Chaos on the Assembly Floor](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziopnkdsb3dXQUOOay6HldoQyhljJSiVuEQ_kzhXWXbKX-g&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mar_26_final&n=1) The Supermajority arrived for Thursday's Assembly Floor Session with a clear goal: to not only stop my bill to suspend the gas tax, but to thwart a vote from even happening. As to the latter objective, they failed. Their ploy was to suddenly move my bill from “the desk,” where it’s been gathering dust, to a new committee just as session began. So when Laurie Davies asked to take up the bill from the desk, as we’d planned, the Speaker ruled her motion out of order. This maneuver was easily countered: James Gallagher invoked Assembly Rule 7, allowing the bill to be pulled from committee and voted on by the whole Assembly. Stunningly, the Speaker simply ignored his motion. When Gallagher appealed the decision, the Speaker interrupted him, wildly banged the gavel, and refused to hold a vote. Vince Fong then stood up, stating that the rules required a vote on Gallagher’s motion. The Speaker denied _that_ point of order. At this point, I stood up. I said the Speaker was “overtly breaking the rules in order to spare members a vote on a matter of profound importance to Californians.” With that, they finally gave up and held the vote. Of course, they again voted to keep the gas tax, with several Members abstaining. I’ve never seen them so rattled. One reporter said it’s been “years” since Democrats at the Capitol were so “on their heels.” This is why Newsom is now floating a “rebate” scheme to send out pre-paid debit cards. They are desperately trying to deflect, to take political cover. But we are fully on offense and not letting up the pressure. [Support my election to Congress](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7Pyuk3g2mp41Qa8XyLKk0CnWqFcPhfo-70bh2d9FGRmWv-G172QGsW76cwQP_qMTr_tK1&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mar_26_final&n=2) [Share this Post on Facebook](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6lRRCK90LByd_IZ7SYQ32hXdGYSh_QNx24op8gCjcFPsRBdD_8OFMVw-LIYJSa42TX1KkEoK7u8Dm-dtatXW-AEHu7i5vpQt8j2dU0uO8vT8Ut45ysZ6KROsK2I-aACjEw&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mar_26_final&n=3) Kevin Kiley
California Legislator

**Voting Battles of 2022 Take Shape as G.O.P. Crafts New Election Bills**

Team, this is just the latest right wing attack on our sacred right to vote -- _and we’re SICK of it!_ [That’s why we’ve drafted a BRAND NEW open letter to Senate Republicans and need 15,000 Democrats to sign on RIGHT NOW »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/7374?t=6&akid=1624%2E878179%2EXBaetr) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/7374?t=7&akid=1624%2E878179%2EXBaetr) | [DONATE $2 TO SIGN THE LETTER AND FIRE SENATE REPUBLICANS »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/7375?t=8&akid=1624%2E878179%2EXBaetr)
---
**TO:** SENATE REPUBLICANS
**FROM:** A Concerned American
**DATE:** March 26, 2022

**Dear Mitch McConnell and your MAGA minions,**

_How many times do we have to do this?_

The American people gave the Democrats a MANDATE to protect voting rights when we sweeped the 2020 Election.

The For the People Act.
The John Lewis Voting Rights Act.
The Right to Vote Act.

**These bills are incredibly popular with the American people and would ensure every person has the ability to vote in free and fair elections.

**Yet YOU continue to block these bills every chance you get! _Are you afraid of running a fair campaign?_
**
[I’m BEYOND sick of it, and I’m sick of you, which is why I’m donating $2 right now to VPP so they can FUND your FIRING »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/7374?t=9&akid=1624%2E878179%2EXBaetr)** | [DONATE $2 TO SIGN THE LETTER »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/7375?t=10&akid=1624%2E878179%2EXBaetr)
---
**I know why you refuse to support this legislation -- you and your alt-right friends know that if you can’t CHEAT, you can’t WIN!**

I’m so tired of you playing games with our constitutional rights, and it’s clear you’ll never come around to do the right thing.

That’s why I’m going to do everything in my power to kick you all out of power and shrink your majority even further! [And it starts right now with my $2 donation to VPP to BOOT you from office »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/7375?t=11&akid=1624%2E878179%2EXBaetr)
[DONATE $2 TO SIGN THE LETTER »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/7375?t=12&akid=1624%2E878179%2EXBaetr)
---
Regards,

**_xx A Concerned American_**
_!! SIGNATURE PENDING $2 DONATION!!_
[DONATE $2 TO SIGN THE LETTER »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/7375?t=13&akid=1624%2E878179%2EXBaetr)
---
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=1624%2E878179%2EXBaetr). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=1624%2E878179%2EXBaetr).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1624%2E878179%2EXBaetr) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=1624%2E878179%2EXBaetr). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=1624%2E878179%2EXBaetr)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=1624%2E878179%2EXBaetr)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jeremy=20Shaffer?=
subject: Campaign Update
body:
As we enter the final week of March, I wanted to send you a quick update on our campaign: new endorsements, our fundraiser (3/28 at the Duquesne Club) | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jeremyshaffer/campaign-update326?e=32107e7cf1)
---
| |
---
| | Hello friends,

As we enter the final week of March, I wanted to send you a quick update on our campaign, including new endorsements, our upcoming fundraiser (March 28th at the Duquesne Club), and yard signs!

Thanks for reading and thanks so much for your support!
---
|
---
| **_🤝 Endorsements ✅_** Earlier this week our campaign was excited to be [endorsed by ](https://JeremyShaffer.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=168b3aab49521aba8263d07fe&id=3270948131&e=32107e7cf1)[Rep. Glenn "GT" Thompson](https://JeremyShaffer.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=168b3aab49521aba8263d07fe&id=c4d1f7b285&e=32107e7cf1) (PA-15), Dean of Pennsylvania's Republican Delegation to Congress. And today we're proud to announce our campaign has been endorsed by all three members of the North Fayette Township Board of Supervisors: Chairman Jim Morosetti, Vice Chairman Bob Dodatto, and Treasurer Mark O'Donnell.

"We've met with Jeremy and he's proven himself a strong and respected leader who will fight for North Fayette and our local communities in D.C.," said **Bob Doddato, Vice Chairman of the North Fayette Township Board of Supervisors**. "Jeremy is both a man of integrity and an innovative entrepreneur who has created jobs in this region, both are things that we desperately need more of in Washington. We have great confidence that Jeremy will be a problem-solver who will work with anyone to get things done for Western Pennsylvania families, and we're proud to endorse him for Congress."

To view our full list of endorsements, or to publicly endorse our campaign yourself, visit [www.JeremyShaffer.com/Endorsements](https://JeremyShaffer.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=168b3aab49521aba8263d07fe&id=af2079ddbc&e=32107e7cf1).
---
|
---
|
---
| _**🎉 Duquesne Club Fundraiser on March 28th **💸_ On Monday, March 28th, we will be hosting our first big fundraiser of the campaign. As you know, running for Congress is an expensive endeavor and I would greatly appreciate your support and attendance at the Duquesne Club in two days. The invite is below and in the meantime you can always donate online by [CLICKING HERE](https://JeremyShaffer.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=168b3aab49521aba8263d07fe&id=3170961815&e=32107e7cf1) or by writing a check for "Friends of Jeremy Shaffer" to P.O. Box 391, Gibsonia, PA 15044.

Please RSVP to my campaign manager Trevor, who can be reached via text at 508-826-5135 or via email at [trevor@jeremyshaffer.com](mailto:trevor@jeremyshaffer.com?subject=Jeremy%20Shaffer%20for%20Congress%20\(PA-17\)).
---
|
---
|
---
| 🚨 _ **Yard Signs Are In! **_🇺🇸 Show your friends and neighbors that you're on Team Shaffer by requesting your sign today! We have the standard yard signs as well as five different types of 4x4 signs, which you can see below. If you know of any good locations where we could place the larger signs, please let us know!

You can pick one up at our office at 9066 Perry Hwy, Pittsburgh, PA 15237 or request one here: [www.JeremyShaffer.com/Volunteer](https://JeremyShaffer.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=168b3aab49521aba8263d07fe&id=072005a414&e=32107e7cf1) and we'll get one delivered to you!
---
|
---
|
---
| _👍 **Get Involved! **😀_ __**VOLUNTEER**__ _**- **_Do you want to help put out yard signs? Knock doors? Make phone calls? Address envelopes? Host a meet & greet? Just help out around the office? Sign up on our website to volunteer by [CLICKING HERE](https://JeremyShaffer.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=168b3aab49521aba8263d07fe&id=04d4a306be&e=32107e7cf1) and our campaign will reach out to you and get you plugged in!
__**INTERN**__ _**- **_PA-17 will be one of the most expensive, targeted congressional campaigns in America, and our campaign is looking for dedicated interns to help our efforts! Interns can gain valuable experience in a variety of areas including field organizing, event planning, volunteer recruitment, data management, and fundraising. The goal of this internship is to match student interests to campaign needs and allow students to gain hands-on experience both in the field of their choice and in Western Pennsylvania politics more broadly. Do you know a high school or college student who might be interested? Please email our campaign manager Trevor ([trevor@jeremyshaffer.com](mailto:trevor@jeremyshaffer.com?subject=Jeremy%20Shaffer%20for%20Congress%20\(PA-17\))) so that we can get them involved!
---
|
---
| To follow our campaign more closely, please check out our website ([www.JeremyShaffer.com](https://JeremyShaffer.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=168b3aab49521aba8263d07fe&id=425a81919d&e=32107e7cf1)) and like our page on Facebook ([@shaffer4pa](https://JeremyShaffer.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=168b3aab49521aba8263d07fe&id=ab1aa4af50&e=32107e7cf1)). And if you can, please forward this email to a few friends -- we'd love to add more people to our distribution list.

Thanks for your commitment to our country. I know together we can make a difference for our children's future.
---
|
---
| Sincerely,
Jeremy Shaffer
---
| [DONATE >>>](https://JeremyShaffer.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=168b3aab49521aba8263d07fe&id=750ab99d24&e=32107e7cf1 "DONATE >>>")
---
| | [www.JeremyShaffer.com](https://JeremyShaffer.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=168b3aab49521aba8263d07fe&id=40e14887a8&e=32107e7cf1)
---
| | | | | | [](https://JeremyShaffer.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=168b3aab49521aba8263d07fe&id=42f2510199&e=32107e7cf1)
---
| | [](https://JeremyShaffer.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=168b3aab49521aba8263d07fe&id=8d4e33e0bd&e=32107e7cf1)
---
| | [](https://JeremyShaffer.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=168b3aab49521aba8263d07fe&id=b5922de747&e=32107e7cf1)
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2022 Friends of Jeremy Shaffer, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Friends of Jeremy ShafferPO Box 391Gibsonia, PA 15044-0391
[Add us to your address book](https://JeremyShaffer.us14.list-manage.com/vcard?u=168b3aab49521aba8263d07fe&id=80bd9e1295)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://JeremyShaffer.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=168b3aab49521aba8263d07fe&id=80bd9e1295&e=32107e7cf1&c=6be95c1dca) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://JeremyShaffer.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=168b3aab49521aba8263d07fe&id=80bd9e1295&e=32107e7cf1&c=6be95c1dca).
---

subject: Dinner with President Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
---
| | | Peter,

Are you really turning down the chance of a lifetime to have dinner with President Trump? We're SHOCKED!

We thought you were a top supporter of President Trump and House Conservatives, but our records show you _**DECLINED your chance to have dinner in Dallas with President Trump. **_

You MUST correct the record now, or we will offer your spot to the next Patriot on our list!
* * *
** SUPPORTER: _[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59953514:JYd65poNa:m:1:3253819041:1F230D7EE435F2E04C467E443A5064C0:r "dpwillis67@gmail.com")_
RSVP: DECLINED**
* * *
_**[RSVP NOW to enter to win a trip of a lifetime that includes travel arrangements, a hotel stay, and dinner with the President himself!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59953514:JYd65poNa:m:1:3253819041:1F230D7EE435F2E04C467E443A5064C0:r "RSVP NOW to enter
to win a trip of a lifetime that includes travel arrangements, a hotel stay, and dinner with the President himself!")**_

Thank you,

Trump Dinner Reservations

---
| |
* * *

Link")

Pelosi's raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59953515:JYd65poNa:m:1:3253819041:1F230D7EE435F2E04C467E443A5064C0:r "Can we count on you to step up?")**************************************************************************

To enter by making a contribution use this form. Void where prohibited. The Promotion begins on Wednesday, March 9th, 2022 at 12:00 am Eastern Time and ends on Sunday, May 1st, 2022 at 11:59pm Eastern Standard Time. All entries must be received by 11:59pm Eastern Standard Time on Sunday, May 1st, 2022. One winner will receive the following Prize: two (2) tickets to the May 9th NRCC 2022 Majority Dinner; transportation for two (2), made at the discretion of the NRCC, within the continental United States to event location and from winners home location, with an approximate retail value of $1,500; one (1) one-night hotel stay at a Dallas, Texas hotel, with an approximate retail value of $500. The total approximate retail value of the prize is $2,500. Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. The Promotion is open to citizens and permanent residents (green card holders) of the United States who are legal residents of one of the fifty states, Puerto Rico, or the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age or the age of majority as determined by state law. name: Chris Cox, Bikers for Trump
subject: This isn’t good
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bikers for Trump**
body:
I’m on the ground in Georgia for President Trump’s Rally tonight and the news isn’t good. I'm on the ground in Georgia for President Trump's Rally tonight and the news isn't good. | Peter, Chris here with Bikers for Trump with an urgent message.

I'm on the ground in Georgia for President Trump's Rally today and the news isn't good.

The response from Bikers across the Country to come and stand guard against the violent Left has been overwhelming.

Now we're facing a real danger of running low on fuel and supplies to keep them on watch through tomorrow's rally. If this keeps up, we'll have to turn away Bikers and leave significant gaps in our line.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Heidi=20St.=20John?=
subject: Does truth matter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Heidi St
body:
Check out our newsletter! | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/heidistjohnforcongress/elections-have-consequences-15927387?e=b0bcc6b4f9)
---
| | |
---
| | | March 26, 2022 Hi Friends, What is truth? Is there such a thing? Does it even matter? Yes. There is truth—and yes. It matters. This week, we are seeing firsthand what happens when we deny basic truth. As America watched the Senate confirmation hearings for Supreme Court Nominee Ketanji Brown Jackson, a national conversation about truth was happening around our kitchen tables and in coffee shops across the United States. Apparently, our new SCOTUS nominee can’t distinguish what a woman is, because she’s “not a biologist.” This is the direct result of leftist indoctrination. How did a WOMAN who cannot tell male from female rise to the place where she would be considered for a seat on the highest court in the land? Here’s how: President Biden narrowed the field of nominees, first by 88% when he said he would only consider people of color and then by 94% when he said he would only consider women of color. Out of the remaining 6% of possible candidates, he selected Mrs. Jackson. We all hoped she would have a sharp, legal mind, and demonstrate a thorough understanding of the US Constitution. We hoped we would see that she held to a resolute commitment to not legislate from the bench. Unfortunately, she was predictably coy in her responses to the questions of US Senators. Her vague answers to questions and outright refusal to answer in some cases should leave every American wondering where she stands on most of the important issues facing the Supreme Court. Beyond that, Mrs. Jackson and her handlers cried foul when anyone asked to see her Law School Admission Test (LSAT). That’s the problem (and frankly, the point) of identity politics. When we base decisions on someone’s identity, we automatically erect a barricade to make sure no one is allowed to question decisions or risk being accused of one “ism” or another. We are witnessing firsthand what can happen when someone is chosen based on their identity rather than their qualification as we watch Kamala Harris fumble each assignment. There’s a reason Kamala couldn’t appeal to even 1% of Democrats in the polls during the 2020 primaries. She’s simply incompetent. I sincerely hope that’s not the case with Mrs. Brown. But when the hands of our Senators are tied, we can only wait and see. In the meantime, we are told to be satisfied with answers like, “I can’t define a woman because I’m not a biologist.” Turns out, truth matters. I’m thankful for the Senators who are asking the right questions. Even if it might seem futile, the questions they are asking Mrs. Jackson are important. They’re giving Americans a front-row seat to the disastrous outcomes of leftist ideology. We need new leadership in the United States—and I’m ready. I’m ready to go to Washington D.C. and shine the light of truth into every darkened corner of American politics. To do that, I need your help. Please help me get to Congress by **[_donating today_](https://heidistjohnforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=46e715d1574a19c15defda548&id=a0dd67b518&e=b0bcc6b4f9)**. We’re coming up to our March 31 fundraising deadline!

For Freedom,
---
|
---
| _**Heidi St. John**_
_Candidate for Congress, SW Washington_
Standing Up For What We Believe

body:
| Hi! I introduced myself a few weeks ago before our campaign launch. I’m Sylvia, the Organizing Director here at Kildee HQ.

Dan is facing his toughest race ever and as Organizing Director, it’s my job to ensure we reach everyone in Mid-Michigan with our positive message, including the 150,000+ new constituents Dan needs to introduce himself to before November.

This won’t be easy. That’s why our hyper-localized grassroots organizing plan needs to expand rapidly.

**_[Will you chip in ahead of Dan’s FEC deadline next week to help us build our organization out?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43419048/337111647/-409930011?amount=15&contactdata=dQ0mWy7IHifn/D7s1GPu1dp9kJ9Q6o2nMs8a5nilFW2AtofNhrA08y5PH1yn+Rq/znwM6+V2KhWEtWLXYk1HbknVoaUfSBnCEgRVL4SJfwMsOUg9q1M7Ji9wZxne2HsHkWp5ynQh921kyEl4NixuUQ==&refcode2=6ad4db59-3fad-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&refcode=DK_EM_FR_3MO_20220326_2_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWQ0ZGI1OS0zZmFkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SXkWcp8VKT9xRzduOdOQzBrViIv9qg438JEPPmcRdHQ=)_**

**Because of redistricting, Dan’s “toss up” race has been labeled as one of the most competitive nationwide and will determine the balance of power in Congress._That’s why it’s so important that we reach every single one of our goals from here to Election Day._**

Thanks and talk soon,

Sylvia
–
Sylvia de Boer, Organizing Director

* * *
Congressman Dan Kildee – a Flint native – is proud to represent mid-Michigan. As a Democratic party leader, Dan is fighting hard to ensure every American has access to quality health care, clean water and a good-paying job.
