name: Team Schmidt
subject: Support Rolls In For Team Schmidt!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC
body:
The November election is right around the corner and over the past two weeks, Team Schmidt has gotten some major endorsements, including three former Friend, The November election is right around the corner and over the past two weeks, Team Schmidt has gotten some major endorsements, including three former mayors of Wichita! We like sharing these endorsements not just because we are really proud of them - we are - but more importantly because we want YOUR support if you haven’t already joined our movement and we ask you to forward this email and share these with friends and family who might be interested in being a part of our team as well. [**JOIN TEAM SCHMIDT**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=857813c54ba44831944e6c798ae886bd&_e=IVRjYT2ACmF6Ig27Wmrs_wqOcdL1wRmk7cIwTdMcK7OzqqfACfFdBMnopz4kmLvW3MUImisWE2xcjS2N6wU6YNaIowcCu_WJ_rvBHmUEv9iKMDVkn5YeOz-ZuxNt8C4hvXZbXdsxkv5iZOWUEMxyAmqnGpPsYw8Wv0GLJQavBiTPK8zZO_GqkwCEGCsFXltpuiPcawnBMW9LjIMKo-nO53DiMpgvh98-fl95tt59IFk3te5ZIjDDkXoC07xR6nfRpNZ9R25VT4PnK26DFJzhxSINli-Zy5wukyV96-aly_KMc35uXA1DXHTVzxH-xNF6f1_eSrll44_F2QdK65qALFfypMypByJb3XXmkdk5SggWf1dk77twvXAz_pO_DOmEsRIjrt54zatKO7w_Py_Z2P4CH7k6m5DFAFiT1MIaql0QDPxoFRQWFPI2oRvSyXPphFAbciJOOnFYX16bYEI4CxJ9__25-qPqLKW8PfGl3GlWaf7Tdy0MWbaJ8Qb-Y0dQ) Check out each of our recent endorsements below: _“It is imperative that we get our great state back on track. The best person that can lead Kansas into a better future is Derek Schmidt.Our next generation deserves to have a chance for success and Derek will provide that opportunity for everyone as our Kansas governor.” _ **Jeff Longwell, Former Wichita Mayor** _“The Jefferson County Republican Central Committee has voted to endorse Derek Schmidt for Kansas Governor. Derek represents the best of Kansas values, and we are proud to support him. Derek is a strong, conservative Constitutionalist. As attorney general he has fought to protect our God-given rights, and we have no doubts that he will continue to do so as governor. After three years of oppressive mandates and a failed vision from the Kelly administration, Kansas is ready for a strong leader who cares more about the freedom of the people of Kansas than about controlling the people of Kansas. We are honored to issue this endorsement.” _ **Jefferson County Kansas Republican Central Committee** _“I am pleased to endorse Derek Schmidt for Governor of Kansas. He has done an excellent job as Kansas Attorney General and has a clear vision, experience, and dedication to serve the people of Kansas. Derek has expressed his commitment to uphold our rights and freedoms under our state constitution. Derek is honest, intelligent, and committed to make positive changes in the life of all Kansans.”_ **Carlos Mayans, Former Wichita Mayor** _“The Executive Committee of the Marshall County Republican Party is honored to endorse Attorney General Derek Schmidt for Governor. Derek has the knowledge, values, and experience needed to win this race against Laura Kelly and to get our state back on track...Derek Schmidt will be a governor who values freedom and individual liberty, and will help Kansas small businesses, workers, families, and children grow and thrive. He will be a true “education governor” by protecting our children from radical teachings like critical race theory and making sure they learn in the classroom not on computers at home. He is the right leader our state needs. We encourage all Kansans to vote for Derek Schmidt for Governor.” _ **Marshall County Republican Party Executive Committee** _“Kansas needs a new governor who will provide strong leadership and get our state back on track after the last few years of failures under Laura Kelly. Derek Schmidt has proven he is that leader, who shares our values and listens to Kansas before he acts. He will make a great governor who will bring us together and make sure Kansas is the best place in America to raise a family and build a business.” _ **Bob Knight, Former Wichita Mayor** _“Derek Schmidt has been an excellent attorney general, fighting every day to keep Kansas safe and always having our back in law enforcement. He’s been a great friend to Pawnee County and has visited with us many times over his years in public service. We know that he cares about rural Kansas, and it’s so important to have a governor who understands our needs and knows how to deliver. He will do a great job as our next governor, and he has my full support.” _ **Scott King, Pawnee County Sheriff ** _“We need a Governor who understands and believes in personal responsibility and individual freedom and will protect our God-given rights. We need a candidate that has a breadth and depth of experience to successfully administer the responsibilities of the Office of Governor of the Great State of Kansas. Perhaps most importantly, we need someone who trusts and listens to Kansans before he determines how to approach a policy question. We have such a candidate in Derek Schmidt. Derek is a good friend with whom I served in the Kansas Senate, and I’m honored to support him in this race. Please join me in voting for Derek Schmidt for Governor.” _ **Pat Apple, Former State Senator and Former Kansas Corporation Commissioner** _“PROUD to stand up and support Derek Schmidt as the next Governor of our great state. When it comes to the kitchen table issues - healthcare, education, jobs and economic security, Derek is the leader Kansans need at the helm. I look forward to our important work ahead in getting Kansans back to work, ensuring we take care of our most vulnerable, improving the quality of education in Kansas classrooms and lowering the cost of healthcare. Derek will continue to be a strong leader for Kansas and work every day to make it the best state in the country to live, work, and raise a family. He has my full support in the race for governor.” _ **Sara Hart Weir, Former President & CEO, National Down Syndrome Society; Chairwoman, Kansans for Term Limits; Co-Chair, Maggie’s List (Kansas)** We're proud to gain the support of more and more Kansas leaders from all across our great state each and every week. But we're especially glad to have you on board. A big win on election day will be because of YOUR support, so keep spreading the word, get involved, and stay up to date. We're so glad you're on this team! -Team Schmidt

| |
---
PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC.,

We like sharing these endorsements not just because we are really proud of them - we are - but more importantly because we want YOUR support if you haven’t already joined our movement and we ask you to forward this email and share these with friends and family who might be interested in being a part of our team as well. Check out each of our recent endorsements below: “It is imperative that we get our great state back on track. Derek represents the best of Kansas values, and we are proud to support him. Derek is a strong, conservative Constitutionalist. As attorney general he has fought to protect our God-given rights, and we have no doubts that he will continue to do so as governor. After three years of oppressive mandates and a failed vision from the Kelly administration, Kansas is ready for a strong leader who cares more about the freedom of the people of Kansas than about controlling the people of Kansas. We are honored to issue this endorsement.” Jefferson County Kansas Republican Central Committee “I am pleased to endorse Derek Schmidt for Governor of Kansas. He has done an excellent job as Kansas Attorney General and has a clear vision, experience, and dedication to serve the people of Kansas. Derek has expressed his commitment to uphold our rights and freedoms under our state constitution. Derek is honest, intelligent, and committed to make positive changes in the life of all Kansans.” Carlos Mayans, Former Wichita Mayor “The Executive Committee of the Marshall County Republican Party is honored to endorse Attorney General Derek Schmidt for Governor. Derek has the knowledge, values, and experience needed to win this race against Laura Kelly and to get our state back on track...Derek Schmidt will be a governor who values freedom and individual liberty, and will help Kansas small businesses, workers, families, and children grow and thrive. He will be a true “education governor” by protecting our children from radical teachings like critical race theory and making sure they learn in the classroom not on computers at home. He is the right leader our state needs. Have you seen the polls in our Senate race lately? _It's VERY tight._

We need your help to stay ahead and expand our lead. | Peter - Have you seen the polls in our Senate race lately? It's VERY tight. RealClearPolitics.com averages every public poll that is done for a particular race and puts out what is known as the "RCP Average" - a term every campaign staffer and reporter knows well because it indicates trends in a race. Please see below for the RCP average in OUR race: As you can see, we're up over our opponent on average by ONE POINT. We're asking for just $1 today to help us expand our +1-point polling average lead in the Georgia Senate race. Thanks, Team Herschel | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC.

subject: WATCH TODAY: President Trump Rally in Commerce
body:
President Trump is in Commerce today to Support America First Candidate David Perdue for Governor | | | [ ](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=b0a7ec1bae&e=89fb4d5220)
---
| President Trump is in Commerce today hosting a rally for our campaign for governor!

I'm humbled to have President Trump's **complete and total endorsement**. With his help, we’re going to beat Kemp in May and Abrams in November and get our state back.

President Trump is going to let us know what's at stake in the primary election on May 24th.

**The only weapon we have against the madness in Washington and the corruption under the Gold Dome is our vote.**

If you have a few minutes, I hope you'll tune in, watch the rally, and hear President Trump's message for Georgians.

-David
_The rally starts at 4:00 p.m. President Trump is expected to speak around 7 p.m. _ [**CLICK HERE TO WATCH LIVE**](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=8746852946&e=89fb4d5220)

This was all possible thanks to a groundswell of incredible grassroots support from people like you.

**But now, President Biden issued a strong warning that all of our progress is on the line if Republicans win back control of Congress in November!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43422005/337141152/1282959901?refcode=20220326_em_f_3DB_nd&amount=10&amounts=5,35,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmQ0MzgyMS02N2FkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WX5Nm6eGAo_APKupeW1J37UYdEjU9Y5dmika9E9iEOU=) | [“This off-year election, in my view, may be the most important off-year election in modern history.” — President Biden](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43422006/337141154/1282959901?refcode=20220326_em_f_3DB_nd&amount=10&amounts=5,35,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmQ0MzgyMS02N2FkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WX5Nm6eGAo_APKupeW1J37UYdEjU9Y5dmika9E9iEOU=)

[5X Match: Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43422007/337141155/1282959901?refcode=20220326_em_f_3DB_nd&amount=10&amounts=5,35,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmQ0MzgyMS02N2FkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WX5Nm6eGAo_APKupeW1J37UYdEjU9Y5dmika9E9iEOU=)

| | | Hi Friends,

I am hosting Rick Green's six-week Biblical Citizenship course at the Firmly Planted Family Home School Resource Center starting on Sunday, April 3rd, from 3 to 5 PM. We will also be streaming it **ONLINE** so no matter where you live you can join.

The course will run every Sunday until May 22nd. Both the course and the study materials are free of charge.

Together, let's learn more about the biblical, historical and Constitutional foundation of our freedom!

Sincerely,
---
|
---
| _**Heidi St. John**_
_Candidate for Congress, WA-03_

body:
We don’t have to wait for another mass shooting to pass common sense gun safety legislation. Instead of reacting to tragedy, we have the power to prevent it.

Team,

The Democratic Ohio Gubernatorial Democratic Primary debate is just days away. This will be the first big test of this campaign, and Nan is counting on us to show her support.

We’re closer than ever to voting Ohio’s first elected female governor into office. Our momentum keeps building, and new people have been signing up to join Team Nan every day.

**[Will you add your name now and officially endorse Nan Whaley for Governor of Ohio before Tuesday’s debate? It’s time to become an official Nan Fan!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43422070/337143631/-963922768?ms=nw_em_220327_1_t1&refcode=nw_em_220327_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjU2NjYyNy02OGFkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oqob9hvqCZ8JWL5BP62t9w2YWb-Elm2IttVQ-UafrOc=&emci=e915829c-66ad-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=6f566627-68ad-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=24357242)**

clean_body: We don’t have to wait for another mass shooting to pass common sense gun safety legislation. Instead of reacting to tragedy, we have the power to prevent it. Team, The Democratic Ohio Gubernatorial Democratic Primary debate is just days away. This will be the first big test of this campaign, and Nan is counting on us to show her support. We’re closer than ever to voting Ohio’s first elected female governor into office. Our momentum keeps building, and new people have been signing up to join Team Nan every day. Whether it’s her plan to bring opportunity back to Ohio or her strategy for fighting corruption, there are so many reasons to be on Team Nan. Nan is the only non-millionaire in this race. She can’t fund her own campaign and flood the airwaves like some opponents. Grassroots support from around the state is crucial in getting her message out there. name: =?utf-8?Q?Matthew=20Burril?=
subject: Update from Team Burril:
body:
Open Now. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us20.campaign-archive.com/?e=80f8383115&u=2d856a0cc32aa614db81ad78e&id=21895e1055)
---
| | [ ](https://burrilforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2d856a0cc32aa614db81ad78e&id=cfd3756a04&e=80f8383115)
---
| | Friends,

We are entering the last six weeks** ** of this Congressional campaign! Are you ready to send a Conservative, Christian, Businessman to Washington?

**_Early Voting in North Carolina begins April 28 and the official Primary Voting date is May 17_**. The deadline to register to vote is less than a month away. You can find out how to register to vote [here](https://burrilforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2d856a0cc32aa614db81ad78e&id=96a899f2d4&e=80f8383115). I cannot stress enough how important it is to make sure you, your family members, friends and neighbors are registered to vote!

_Can I count on you to do that? _
---
|
---
| **From the Campaign Trail **
---
| From Graham County to McDowell County and everywhere in between, I have visited every county in the new 11th district. I have met with supporters, Sheriffs, County Commissioners and every county Republican Party chairperson. The response to Team Burril's campaign message has been encouraging. The desire for mature, committed representation WNC is obvious.
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
|
---
| Folks in Western North Carolina and all across America are uniting this primary season in numbers that I have not seen in my lifetime. Local people are feeling the direct influence of the Federal government in their daily lives...not only at the gas pump and the grocery store, but in their schools, doctor's offices, and their workplace.

I hope everyone has had a great weekend and I look forward to seeing you on the campaign trail soon!

Thank you,
---
|
---
Matthew Burril
Candidate for U.S. Congress
| | | | | | | [](https://burrilforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2d856a0cc32aa614db81ad78e&id=20e422e028&e=80f8383115)

name: BetoORourke.com
subject: We're racing to raise $1,200,000
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
We're reaching out to ask for your help.
#
We're building a historic grassroots movement to defeat Greg Abbott and elect Beto as the next Governor of Texas — but we have to be real about the fact that Abbott started this race with a $50 million head start. That's why we have to ask:
[Will you donate $3 or more right now to help power Beto's campaign to be a Governor for ALL Texans?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54369?refcode=ema20220326-182210&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=182210%2E444211%2E9U5T0J)
**FIRST:** We won our primary election on March 1, making this race officially Beto vs. Abbott. In response, one of Abbott's strategists told reporters that they plan to spend _over $100 million_ attacking Beto and our people-powered campaign.
**THEN:** Beto and our team got on the road for a multi-week drive to EVERY part of Texas to meet with, listen to, and learn from folks in their communities because that's how we're going to win — by going _everywhere_ and meeting _everyone_.
**NOW:** We're racing to raise $1,200,000 before our big end-of-quarter fundraising deadline on Thursday, and we're currently running _behind_ our projections.
Going up against Greg Abbott and his corporate mega-donors is going to require a lot of resources, so we're reaching out to ask for your help:
**Time and time again, we've proven that we have the people power to elect Beto as the next Governor of Texas, but Beto needs the financial resources to make it happen.[Please, pitch in your first donation right now to help us reach our $1,200,000 goal and make history.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54369?refcode=ema20220326-182210&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=182210%2E444211%2E9U5T0J)**
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54369?refcode=ema20220326-182210&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=182210%2E444211%2E9U5T0J)**
This race is about so much more than electing Beto and defeating Abbott. It's about keeping the lights on, fully funding public schools, creating jobs with living wages and great benefits, expanding Medicaid so people can see a doctor, ensuring Texans' access to reproductive care, and more. **Let's win this.**
In solidarity,
Beto for Texas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220326-182210-footer&t=22&refcode2=182210_444211_9U5T0J&akid=182210%2E444211%2E9U5T0J)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/bft-receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.betoorourke.com/sign/bft-personal-info/?t=23&akid=182210%2E444211%2E9U5T0J)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=182210%2E444211%2E9U5T0J)

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: So much to do!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
So little time left |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=a38df3d523&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
We have so little time left and so much to do!

**_[We are just days away from the end of the month, and we need to raise an additional $32,450 to hit our end of quarter goal.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=9d637e463d&e=44b8c466b0)_**

You have been with me from the beginning, and I need you more than ever now.

**Together, we have fought for successful audits, currency-grade watermarked ballots, and Election Integrity in not only Arizona, but throughout the United States.**

_We have done so much together, and I haven’t even been elected yet._

_Imagine what we will do together when I win in November!_

[**But this doesn’t happen if you don’t help me now.**](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=742066f843&e=44b8c466b0)

**_[Are you with me? Take a stand right now for Election Integrity.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=2f210c06c4&e=44b8c466b0)_**

I cannot begin to describe how close we are. I know I must be driving my family mad with how much work I am doing, but they understand and support me – because they know how important this job is.

I am continuing to push for decertification of the Maricopa county election with cause. This election was so filled with fraud and incompetence that it cannot be allowed to stand. We have jurisprudence and the constitution on our side for this argument.

As you well know, the most important things in life require sacrifice – and I will sacrifice myself again and again for election integrity.

**Unlike the Leftists who stole the election, I can factually say that I AM proud to be an American, and I will do everything I can to make sure that being an American means being free – and right now that is in terrible jeopardy.**

But we have made huge strides.
* We have fought for Audits nationwide, including successfully auditing Maricopa county and discovering countless irregularities.
* I have developed currency-grade watermarking for ballots to make sure that fraud CANNOT happen.
* I have supported countless Election Integrity candidates around the country.
* I have done all of this while fighting for America first, Conservative Values in the Arizona House of Representatives.

[**And we will continue to make huge strides, as long as I receive your urgent support.**](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7fa35de284&e=44b8c466b0)

**_[Please chip in with a rush donation of $25, $50, or $100 today to make a dent in our big fundraising goal of raising $32,450 by the end of the month!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=89cf666f74&e=44b8c466b0)_**

**_Can you help?_**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=c2fe2001f5&e=44b8c466b0)

clean_body: So little time left | | | | | Dear , We have so little time left and so much to do! You have been with me from the beginning, and I need you more than ever now. Together, we have fought for successful audits, currency-grade watermarked ballots, and Election Integrity in not only Arizona, but throughout the United States. We have done so much together, and I haven’t even been elected yet. Imagine what we will do together when I win in November! I cannot begin to describe how close we are. I know I must be driving my family mad with how much work I am doing, but they understand and support me – because they know how important this job is. I am continuing to push for decertification of the Maricopa county election with cause. This election was so filled with fraud and incompetence that it cannot be allowed to stand. We have jurisprudence and the constitution on our side for this argument. As you well know, the most important things in life require sacrifice – and I will sacrifice myself again and again for election integrity. Unlike the Leftists who stole the election, I can factually say that I AM proud to be an American, and I will do everything I can to make sure that being an American means being free – and right now that is in terrible jeopardy. But we have made huge strides. We have fought for Audits nationwide, including successfully auditing Maricopa county and discovering countless irregularities. I have developed currency-grade watermarking for ballots to make sure that fraud CANNOT happen. I have supported countless Election Integrity candidates around the country. I have done all of this while fighting for America first, Conservative Values in the Arizona House of Representatives. Can you help? | | Mark Finchem Arizona House of Representatives – District 11 Republican for Arizona Secretary of State Conservative Election Integrity Patriot PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE | | | Copyright © 2022 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved. body:

body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=3004%2E3611125%2E_FpoYk ][IMG]

Folks, allow me to let you in on a little secret about the GOP
candidates running for Senate in Ohio:

They don’t give a damn about Ohioans.

At best, they’re out-of-touch, highfalutin millionaires and corporate
raiders. At worst, they’re dangerous, extremist fanatics who will do
anything to win.

That’s why we’ve got to fight to elect Tim Ryan—not just because he’s the
best candidate in this race (he is), but because we can’t let Republicans
behind the wheel again.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/9635?t=1015&amount=25&akid=3004%2E3611125%2E_FpoYk ]Tim’s got a big End-of-Quarter deadline coming up, and we need to raise
$150,000 to be competitive with the GOP goons and their billionaire
backers. Can I count on you to chip in ASAP?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/9635?t=1016&amount=25&akid=3004%2E3611125%2E_FpoYk ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/9635?t=1017&amount=50&akid=3004%2E3611125%2E_FpoYk ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/9635?t=1018&amount=100&akid=3004%2E3611125%2E_FpoYk ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/9635?t=1019&amount=200&akid=3004%2E3611125%2E_FpoYk ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/9635?t=1020&amount=250&akid=3004%2E3611125%2E_FpoYk ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/9635?t=1021&amount=25&akid=3004%2E3611125%2E_FpoYk ]Other Amount

These yahoos don’t care about Ohio—they care about getting Trump’s stamp
of approval and further enriching themselves and their wealthy friends.

Too many working families are struggling just to get by, but the
Republicans in this race are hanging around Mar-A-Lago and kissing Trump’s
ring to curry favor—they think the sun comes up just to hear him crow.

Tim Ryan isn’t beholden to ultra-rich special interests. He’d rather have
you in his corner, and that’s why we’ve got to work like hell to make sure
he wins.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/9635?t=1022&amount=25&akid=3004%2E3611125%2E_FpoYk ]All of our hard work won’t amount to a hill of beans if we fall short
of this $150,000 End-of-Quarter goal, so will you stand up and fight by
contributing to his campaign right now?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/9635?t=1009&amount=25&akid=3004%2E3611125%2E_FpoYk ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/9635?t=1010&amount=50&akid=3004%2E3611125%2E_FpoYk ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/9635?t=1011&amount=100&akid=3004%2E3611125%2E_FpoYk ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/9635?t=1012&amount=200&akid=3004%2E3611125%2E_FpoYk ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/9635?t=1013&amount=250&akid=3004%2E3611125%2E_FpoYk ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/9635?t=1014&amount=25&akid=3004%2E3611125%2E_FpoYk ]Other Amount

Thanks,

James Carville

name: =?utf-8?Q?Becky=20Edwards=20for=20U.S.=20Senate?=
subject: Springtime, Sunshine, and Signatures
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becky Edwards for U
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/021b85b9ee46/springtime-sunshine-and-signatures?e=10c1db3257)
---
| | [ ](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=fe0a48a7ed&e=10c1db3257)
---
| Dear Friends,

**Spring has finally arrived** in Utah, and the week's sunshine has put new pep in our step! **Utahns are going out to enjoy the beautiful weather** , and our team is no different—**we will be out ALL weekend gathering signatures!**

**We were the FIRST campaign to submit 28,000 signatures, and the Utah Office of Elections has verified over 22,000 signatures from our submission!**

**This is a monumental accomplishment,** and we couldn’t have done it without the efforts of our amazing signature team and the 800+ volunteers committed to bringing more **productive, proactive, and inclusive solutions to Washington. **

While we are proud to celebrate 22,000 verified signatures, **it is critical that we reach a total of 28,000 verified signatures** to get on the Republican primary ballot.

**We are SO CLOSE to reaching our signature goal,** and I am confident that we can submit the total 28,000 verified signatures **before the submission deadline on April 11th, but we need your help!**

Whether you are enjoying the sun, reading in the park, or exploring Utah's great outdoors this weekend, **you can help us reach our goal to secure our spot on the ballot.** **Here's what you can do:**
* **Make sure you are[registered as a Republican](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=b3e2578e8a&e=10c1db3257)** by the affiliation **deadline on March 31st.** **You MUST be a registered republican for your signature to be verified by the Utah Office of Elections.**
* **Sign with a #TeamBecky member** at [this week's signature locations](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=122afce5c9&e=10c1db3257).
* **[Sign up to gather signatures](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=a97af4b12d&e=10c1db3257)** in your neighborhood, at local events, or your next picnic in the park.
* **Turn in any signatures you have ASAP**. We need as much time as possible to count, verify, and submit signature packets to the Lt. Governor's office. **To submit your signatures, mail your packet to** _Becky Edwards for U.S. Senate, P.O. Box 1467, Bountiful, Utah 84011_ , or visit one of these locations:
* **1121 Eaglewood Loop, North Salt Lake – Anytime**
* **1777 Somerset Ridge, Dr, Draper – Anytime**
* **Harmony, 275 E Center Street, Provo – Business Hours**
* **If you have already submitted your signatures** , [print a new packet](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=cab6744d8b&e=10c1db3257) and keep up the fantastic work!

**This month's signature success was a monumental accomplishment, but the fight isn't over yet, and we need your help to get there!**
---
|
---
| The end of March marks the close of our **first 2022 fundraising quarter**. We asked you to show your support this week by donating for the reasons YOU support me as your candidate for the U.S. Senate.

After three days of voting and **hundreds of dollars in contributions** , our Becky Bracket has a champion!
---
|
---
| **This campaign stands on the power of collaboration.** It is essential to a**healthy democracy **and this week’s bracket proves that **collaboration is something that Utahns value**. I am humbled by your choice to show up and support me this week, and with your help, **I know we can bring collaboration back to Washington.**

**I can't thank you enough** for your continued support of our campaign. Your voice has spread the word that **Utah is ready for better leadership, better politics, and better solutions.**
---
|
---
| _NOTE: On Monday, our newsletter email inadvertently included an image of Becky alongside members of the Utah Federation of Republican Women. This was not intended to reflect an endorsement. We apologize for any confusion. _

**In case you missed it, check out #TeamBecky’s Weekly Roundup!**

clean_body: | | | | | | Dear Friends, Spring has finally arrived in Utah, and the week's sunshine has put new pep in our step! Utahns are going out to enjoy the beautiful weather , and our team is no different—we will be out ALL weekend gathering signatures! We were the FIRST campaign to submit 28,000 signatures, and the Utah Office of Elections has verified over 22,000 signatures from our submission! This is a monumental accomplishment, and we couldn’t have done it without the efforts of our amazing signature team and the 800+ volunteers committed to bringing more productive, proactive, and inclusive solutions to Washington. While we are proud to celebrate 22,000 verified signatures, it is critical that we reach a total of 28,000 verified signatures to get on the Republican primary ballot. We are SO CLOSE to reaching our signature goal, and I am confident that we can submit the total 28,000 verified signatures before the submission deadline on April 11th, but we need your help! Whether you are enjoying the sun, reading in the park, or exploring Utah's great outdoors this weekend, you can help us reach our goal to secure our spot on the ballot.
